Perhaps you can work with her to further your personal understanding of blood magic? 2: Alfons Davis: You've become aware of him mostly through his hatred of your clan. Perhaps you can convince him not all Tremere are bad? 3: Victor Ceeq: A fellow apprentice Tremere, he's done work you've heard of and think well of.

#1 Go to LA and make yourself indespensable, you are skilled, find a niche that is open and occupy it.  #2 Make alliances with those not traditionaly at the top of the pyramid, seem to be receptive to their needs, you can make so many allies cheaply this way.  #3 Find a way to assist the clan in their goals and reputation with a clan that is being overlooked in the court.
Robert Saunders CS, EH, K, P

A-3 Being born as a Revenant has molded every part of your existence. The secrecy, the incarceration, the menial work for decades over and over. But you never faltered. You knew there was going to be the moment you would be able to prove your worth and that day did come. You were asked to spy on a group of Sabbat that were planning on attaching a local court. Spying for the 3 weeks, showed you how worse your life could have been, the Sabbat see their revenant as playthings, not even tools. The moment you got the information you needed you raced back towards the chantry. In your elation to leave you made your first mistake, and were tracked back to the chantry. Turning the doorknob, you saw the darkness rip from your chest, as you blacked out. You awoke as a full vampire member of the Tremere. The reward for the information that was so vital. You are proud of where you came from; you are a classic example of the janitor though hard work joining the board of directors. You know every operation from the ground up, in ways your other chantry mates never will. Regardless of your determination or skill, you still hear the other Tremere talk down to you, they still see you as half human, and not their equal. You must prove them wrong, but in the only way you know how. Perfect service, until.. Wait don’t think about that.. but it must be said, now that you are as one of them, someday you will surpass them. You came to LA, to a new chantry, to give you the chance for quicker promotion, and also to start a household of Revenants. You have a few that help you, and 2 that are pregnant. When you are ready to make your move, your secret allies will allow you to best any of those who scoffed.

#1 Shari Rosenthal (Malkavian) Having been kicked out of her old city because of studding noddist lore, she might know some of the ancient ways to help your “family” #2 Terry Hamby (Nosferantu) Money does not grow on trees, a deal with him might supply enough for the clan and the family. #3 Prudence Ducheski (Revenant Not In Game) She is the defacto, Mother Superior, to the new household, any requests should be made to her, and she will do her best to get them done.

#1. Gain Rank in the Clan, and have a master who trusts and respects you. #2. Start building a manse for your revenant families. They will take a huge amount of support, and extra ghouls to keep the blood strong. #3. Gain allies outside of the clan, they don’t have the issues your clan mates do because they don’t even know what a revenant is.
Cory Wilkerson CS, EH, K, P

Your original name was Ulrich Morris, a retainer of Lady Anne Bowesley from her mortal years. You were always on her side solving her problems dealing with the mortal world, when she was elevated to Prince of London she rose you to the ranks of the undead. Having served as a ghoul for hundreds of years even though decades have past you have yet to break the habit of opening doors for people or getting up when people ask for something. Calling the politics of London extreme would be an understatement, as even Anne, did not start her powerbase there you asked for advice on where to go to make your spurs. After a week she said, Prepare to go to Los Angeles so prepare you did. Why she wanted you to go to an Anarch city, was beyond you. Until one night in court, an Archon came and said that Los Angeles was taken by the Camarilla. How did she know eluded you but you will not question the wisdom that has gotten you this When you were leaving she gave you two things, One advice “Always let a Tremere feel they have the upper hand regardless of what you actually give them” and secondly, and second a request, “There is a book of our legacy lost (something that says all the Ventrue and their generations) a seer has said it will arrive in los angeles. If you can return it to the clan, I will have a personal reward for you my old friend. You got on the plane, and landed in Los Angeles when you tried to feed you learned that none of your old herd fills you anymore. Only vampire blood seems to, You called the Queen in a panic, and she told you that it is common in your line, especially if you lived on vampire blood for so long, and she said you must take the Princehood, or at least get a prince to give you permission to hunt other vampires.

#1 Luke Jackson  (Toreador) A jack of all trades that would make a great ally in the nights coming. You have heard of him but never met. #2 Alexandar Baird (Brujah) A famous sheriff of many courts, the problem is what he is famous for is his princes dying.  #3 Lady Anne Bowesley (Sire) As how well you do reflects on her, she will be happy to help when she can.

#1. Find a stable blood doll in the court, they don’t know your immune to the bond, so maybe they will fall for a lets have a mutual. #2. Get permission to have right of destruction, either as Prince, Sheriff, or Scourge. #3. Find the Book of Legacy, and punish the thieves.
Sean Patrick OLearly CS, EH, K, P

You were an officer in the Spanish Army; you came in with Franco and led many units to victory after victory. Your inspirational speeches kept your people moving forward, and as the nationalists finally won you wondered your place in this new government. Receiving an invitation to dinner, in a wealthy mansion, you polished your buttons and prepared to be given your rewards. The dinner was not what you expected; it was with one person and his butler. You were asked about the nature of power, and what is the “secret” of leading people. Presumably you answered well because that night you were induced in to the clan of kings.  You’re first few years, where harsh but nothing as harsh as the military, and you thrived. You gained your own haven, and only visited your sire occasionally. One of these times you found the haven assaulted by Tremere, being directed past the security by the Butler, Pedro. Seeing yourself outnumbered you jumped from the roof and escaped. Weakened from the fall you fed off the first person you found, and their sickness is still with you. Soon you started traveling, using your military knowledge and the invention of new ways of war to sell powerful weapons to princes and rebels alike. The death of your sire still haunts you, and it has made it that you try your best to not be in the battles anymore. After all is this not the role of kings to but order people and never be on the front?
Recently a weapon was brought to your attention, it was in the hand of an Anarch of Berlin. This handgun, takes bullets are almost shotgun shell sized, and you can not seemly produce anything that makes it shoot. It cost you dearly to acquire it, and the only lead on it is “Mjollnir Mk. IV -  Los Angeles - ”

#1 Pedro Villalobos (Tremere) He was a ghoul who betrayed you and your sire. He killed him in the name of his new clan. #2 Bobby Santos (Assamite) He is a famous gunfighter, if you can get the gun to work, he will pay almost anything for it. #3 Jerome Walters (Ventrue Not in Game) he is a news mogul, who was an ally of your old sire and will try to help how he can.
#1. Learn about the gun, who made it, who is selling it. #2. Mentor someone, you were trained well, pass on the tradition. #3. Gain permission to embrace, Your line can not end with you.
Rachel Judd CS, EH, K, P

(Settite) At school you were a good student, regardless of your families protest that “good girls” did not need an education.  You started sneaking out at night dressed as a man, 3 weeks after you started you noticed you were being followed. After going down a dark alley, you were pushed down, a man leaned over you with fangs extended, and then he realized you were a woman. He started laughing and you felt compelled to follow him.  He showed you the nature of vampirism, and the aspects of clan Ventrue, he explained that he only fed from men, & that when he found your duel nature he knew that you were very good at hiding what you were, Years past until finally he said you were ready for the final secret before your embrace. He said he was not a Ventrue, but a Settite. That the clan of corruption had many vipers in other clans, and he had been doing this for 400 years. If you wanted to be turned, you would have to live a double life forever. Shortly after your embrace you decided the best way to be a Ventrue is to be a gatekeeper, if you wrote the book on what it means, they would all think you are more real then even they are. After mastering that you started to study your true heritage, and underwent the conversion to the Path of Ecstasy. You made yourself a double life. Mistress Isia keeper of a temple of secrets, and Ms. Ueltschi Respected Loremaster of Clan Ventrue. When you learned that Los Angeles was opening up, it seemed like a place big enough for you to grow both sides of your unlife. Recently when running your temple services (under a mask) you saw a person who stayed in the background, but you knew them to be one of the kindred Paul Cotte. While this means you need to be extra careful, it also means this might be a new route to power if you can convert them to the ways of “Mistress Isia”.

#1 Paul Cotte  (Toreador) In looking him up you have learned that it is felt he has lost what makes his art.. Maybe you can “inspire” him #2 Dr. Valerie Penza (Malkavian) She wrote a book about using vampire blood to bring people to enlightenment. Maybe you can corrupt her work to your ends. #3 Basara Al-Butta (Sire Not in Game) He holds that what would give you true independence, one can only hope if your church of mysteries thrives in his eyes you will be worthy of it’s return.

#1. Expand your Temple, by getting other influence and boons, that you can give to the Temple members making them more supportive. #2. Secure a domain, where you will not be disturbed by anyone, so it is easier to switch personas. #3. Gain permission to embrace, Your line can not end with you.
Garrett Scarborough CS, EH, K, P

You have always been near the business of selling people, graduating from being a lookout for the constables, to a recruiter to eventually a runner of your own stable of women. One day a westerner came to your brothel and said he wanted to buy in, you had no intention at first but after the third meeting, you were willing. Over the years you began to learn the nature of vampires and what they were looking for, and your ghoul extended lifetimes gave you the time to learn how to tailor your wares to their wants. Thousands of vampires visited your brothel, more then you can remember, but you listened, and in doing so you learned of the war between the Kuei-jin and your Ventrue masters. The 1000 devils tried to push in to your business as well, after rebuking their attempt you were given the embrace as a reward. You did your Ventrue training in secret, because your sire wanted an ace up his sleeve. That was all until 1999. The Kuei-Jin did a full on assault on the island, and you were able to escape with your floating haven. You sailed around Australia and new Zealand. You made friends everywhere, one of these friends said he had a gift for you but it had to be picked up in Los Angeles. You thanked him but waited out your time, (going to an anarch or a kuei-jin city did not seem like the best of ideas) but recently you have heard that the camarilla has made a place safe and are looking for people with talents. So you pulled up anchor, and pulled in to Marina Del Rey Harbor. Shortly after landing you picked up the package that had been waiting for you.. It’s a staked Kuei-jin. You have spent many nights looking at him trying to decide what to do but it eludes you. Maybe your clanmates or the help of another clan might give you the answers about this body of the enemy.

#1 Scott Davenport  (Toreador) A Hong-Kong-Action-Flick actor, you met briefly, at a dinner party, before the fall. Odds are he does not remember you. #2 Janet Wadsorth (Malkavian) A intriguing performer, that a few of your girls could not stop talking about. If you were to get her to perform, it would make getting that next generation that much easier. #3 Oliver Thrace (Tremere Not in Game) He escaped Hong Kong as well, but sill checks up on you, to make sure things are going ok for you. As he sent you the Kuei-Jin.

#1. Find a better place, then your haven to keep the body, and someone who could help you interrogate him. #2. Get as many people as possible to attend your club, the more they use it the more they need you, the more you can learn from them. #3. Make sure that whoever becomes leader your boat is considered an Elysium.
Charles Stanton CS, EH, K, P

When you were 16, your dad told you a secret. Vampires existed. You wanted to laugh it off, but your dad was not the kind of person to makes things up. He was a mid level cash transporter for a minor bloodline of the Giovanni called the Millners. One day though, dad did not come home. Your mom was heartbroken, and at that moment you knew you had to fix her pain. Now 23, you made it your goal to kill the people who put your father in harms way. Plotting for the next 10 years, you made money and contacts, everything you would need to win but one thing. You needed to be a vampire. In your investigations you learned of the clans, the masquerade and realized this was your time to move. You put all your influence in to play, having a vampires car get stolen from court, his bank accounts wiped, ect. After 2 weeks you made a call, I can fix all of this if just you embrace me. After some back and forth, and 3 havens getting burnt by arsonists. The deal was struck. You were now a member of Clan Ventrue, the first moment you had your freedom you raced to the house of the man who killed your father, and it was empty. Your gathering of influence, pushed out the people you wanted to destroy. You started traveling, using your mob contacts to help the clan and to squash any Giovanni influence you could find. After 50 years you accept the fact that most of the cities influences have been locked down, So when the Clan asked you to go to a city where all of the controllers of the influences had left you were on the next plane. 
Talking to one of your most trusted advisors, you heard something that made you lose your composure for the first time, You heard there is also another major player in this town, Martin Stanton and that’s your father’s name. Your influences have extended as far as possible to determine if it is the same man or what sect he belongs to, but you know he is not a Ventrue.

#1 Edward Caplette (Toreador) A computer expert you helped in the past solve a problem with a corporate takeover, you were paid well for your services and he owes you nothing, but it might be enough of a contact to grow. #2 Anthony Bachmann (Nosferantu) An expert builder of havens and other defensible places, he would be a big accet to your organization.  #3 Jonny Lee (Not in Game) This is one of the New Promise Mandurate members who are still active in the influence game. Getting him taken out would solve a lot of your problems.

#1. Become a vital source of all influence work in Los Angeles. #2. Gather Boon’s and secrets to influence people to help you find out more information about Martin. #3. Make a deal with who ever becomes Scourge or Sheriff, that they will not kill Martin if he is found.

There is a distinct difference between a con man and a grifter: a con artist gets the job done; a grifter does it with style. And you have style in spades. Growing up one of four girls in Belfast, Ireland, you surpassed tomboy” and launched straight into an early career of “juvenile delinquent”. Your parents had no idea what to do with you, so in 1843 they surrendered you to the ‘Magdalen Asylum’, aka – Magdalen Laundries workhouse. It only took one week and one beating for you to realize this was not the life for you. But you’d already caught the eye of “Sister” Margret, the nun the other girls called the Night Witch. You  joined her ranks if ghouled assistants, spending both Great Wars under her tutelage before finally being embraced into Ventrue in 1950. She used you to launder petty cash, make all the bribes and skims clean for the Laundry, and the diocese. And once embraced, you used those contacts to establish a nice and tidy organization of your own, taking her dirty money, cleaning it up, and helping it grow. Your skills, your charms, your panache – your operation was an example to others. But you never could shake the thrill of taking a drunk footballer to the felt and empting his pockets. So much so, when this odd little town called “Las Vegas” started getting a reputation over in the States, you couldn’t help yourself and relocated your operation there. You moved to Los Angeles about two months ago, when there was a misunderstanding in Vegas, the dons made sure you were compensated but hey, it cant hurt to start in a new city.

#1: Madeleine Pelletier: You've heard of the famous cross-dressing French feminist and activist, and admired her work, but you had no idea she'd been Embraced! She's a Brujah, which might be an obstacle to befriending her; but you nevertheless feel the two of you might have things in common. #2: Fernando Mosqueda: A Nosferatu who operates a shipping company in the Southwest, you've paid him for his services several times. He's a solid dealer, which you can respect. #3: Zhao "John" Leiji: Another Ventrue whom you've only heard of by reputation, he might be persuaded to join in on your cons. #4: Micah Langtry: A Ventrue who can barely remember he's a vampire, you feel sorry for the lad and have invited him to travel with you. He's a grifter, like you, though you're better. You've traveled together from Vegas to Los Angeles in search of new opportunities.

#1: With LA becoming a newly established Camarilla city, the opportunties are endless! Make friends and contacts, see who's an easy mark. #2: You've studied the cons and heists of the greats, and now you feel ready to join their ranks. Plan a truly epic con. They may never know who was behind it, but they'll never forget what you did! #3: As much as you hated your time in the Laundries, in retrospect, you recognize a lot of wasted talent went into them. Brilliant, creative and driven women; reduced to washing men's smallclothes. Things are better nowadays, but not much. Set up an institution like the Laundries that will let you filter the diamonds from the coal. Perhaps you'll find your own childe among them.
Mike Leader CS, EH, K, P

Life is a game and you’re on top!  You Think?
If there is one thing you are saddest about its probably not knowing what came before this point. Your memory goes to August 2014, you remember being in Portland OR in some rundown motel.  You had a map with San Fran and LA circled, a large stack of cash, bank docs, and an urge to travel.  You found your keys and headed out.  As you traveled you realized you instinctively know things, you’re a vamp, how to feed, when to hide from the sun etc.  And you are a great grafter and con.  You can do cards, darts, dice, and billiards, all of it.  You can’t seem to lose at a betting situation if you try.  You enjoy it, it’s a thrill, and oh boy do the ones you beat, feel they can get something back from you in the back seat of your car, then you get their blood too.  You don’t really know what drags you south, but something warns you off San Fran, when you work your way there, it’s weird so you leave.  You make it to LA by July of ’15 and find yourself a little gambling den to call your own.  You won it from the previous sharp, but you let him stay on. Besides you always liked the taste of Polynesians for some reason.  You don’t really know why you’re in town or what drove you here, but you are sure some answers are waiting, you have to set up shop, keep your eyes open, make allies and own a few vamps, and learn all the secrets you can.

1: Cool Hand Luke (Toreador) He’s a stage magician, your pretty sure he came here to set up a new little torie empire, you could befriend him, or control him.  Either way most magicians at least know some good card tricks.
2: Nathaniel Johnson (Ventrue) He’s some mob venture, find out what’s up with him, see if  you can use him and his connections
3: Unknown person (NPC) someone keeps leaving you notes, little bits of advice and little observations about what is going on around you. 
4: Shanon O'Connel: One grifter recognizes another. You met up with Shannon while passing through Vegas, and have been traveling together since. She also wants to check out the LA scene.

1: Find out what is going on with you, are you actually Michah Langtry like your identification stated.
2: Find some allies or dupes, either way get some influence
3: Control your little corner of the underworld, make deals with who you need to, and keep your nose out of others business when needed.  Sometimes getting along means ignoring what you see.

records.player: Rodin Mcnerney,  CS , EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
You born in to a Bedouin tribe, which was recruited by T.E. Lawrence, the idea of a homeland of your own was all you needed to run in to the spray of bullets. After Lawrence left Aquaba, and the troops stayed pillaging the city, you found a covered basement that was ignored by your brethren. Walking down there you found yourself transported to a different time, sneaking between the pillars you saw a man conversing with a djinn. So mesmerized you just walked out of your hiding place and stat next to him. Over the next 10 years, he taught you how to connect to the teachings of Islam in ways that always seemed like fairy tales. The idea of you becoming a vampire was just another of the wonders you became used to.
Things were good, your clan needed you, and you had allies in the Courts of the Ashirra it seemed things would continue this way until Cain’s rising. That all changed the night that Ur-Shulgi rose. The faiths of Christianity and Islam where banned, For once you could not obey. You had seen too much bartered with angels and demons, you did not have faith you knew. A few believed as you did, and decided that the enemy of my enemy is my friend. The Camarilla accepted you and your brothers, knowing your wisdom was going to be vital in the days ahead. 
While you cannot beat Ur-Shulgi’s physical power, you will win the war of ideas, you will make the Assamites in to a clan of respect and adoration that wields the weapons of faith and blood in equal measure. You have come to LA in search of an artifact, this necklace is a fetish of an angel you once knew named Wiehael, your divinations tell you it is here, and the owner does not know of it’s power. Convincing someone to give you an empowering artifact will take friends and patience.
records.contacts: #1 April Ueltschi (Ventrue) You have worked for her multiple times, but she never knew your identity, because you worked though intermediaries. She is a researcher from turkey, and you feel if any one will support you out of your clan she will. #2 Eugune Ducheski (Tremere) Your revenant contacts have told you of the ducheski line, if he has influence with revenants he is a threat to be acquired or crippled. #3 Focalor (Spirit Not In Game) You can take a downtime action to try to learn more about spirit goings in the city with this contact.
records.plot_goals: #1. Gather boons to later use to find and acquire the holding place of Wiehael. #2. Convert someone to your faith, who could deny believing when you have the power of faith with you. #3. Make sure your new Camarilla brothers do not treat your people poorly. Make sure that you have the proper titles, representation, embrace and domain rights of other clans. You are not a minor clan in importance and you should not be marginalized.

records.player: Brian Haney CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You would never have said you were good at shooting a gun. It was more the bullets just happened to go where you would need them the best, killing people is just what the result happened to be. You were just a ranch hand until a drunk called you out, and you shot him and his three friends before any of them could even shoot. The legend began to grow, and soon the only people you would meet where people who wanted to be near that fame, or wanted to challenge it. As it was luck and not skill, you got cocky until the dark stranger came, He had a skin unlike anyone had before, like a blackie but not almost like coal. He sad he wanted to see your speed and he was willing to put his life on the line, But it had to be at night. You agreed, and then went off to get drunk, after all it did not take skill. That night when you fought him you saw him dodge every one of your shots, and after your guns were empty he shot 2 shots one in each of your palms. Dragging you off in to the night he taught you respect, patience and the importance of training over just luck. You adapted to vampire life, and after a decade you started taking contacts in the camarilla courts of America. You kept a low profile, but a good reputation. About 10 years ago your sire found you after you had cleared out a Sabbat back out of Miami, and told you that the father clan had betrayed you both. The camarilla was no longer just our employer they are now our home. He took you to meet some of the other new Assamite Cam members, and they took you in as a brother. Now that you belong to a sect, and your clan has a justicar, you want to become known again. The lure of fame, has bit you as you have exited the shadows, maybe you could become a sheriff, and then maybe just maybe an Archon after all you are the best, now with luck and training.
records.contacts: #1 Laura Alvarado (Toreador) You worked on her fathers farm iny your mortal days, She does not remember you, but she has a face you could never forget. #2 Marco Del Juro (Ventrue) A famous gunsmith and weapons dealer in the supernatural circles, you have waned a Del Juro gun for years, and the idea of meeting him almost makes your heart beat.  #3 Marco Enrathi (Revenant Not In Game) Your travels have had you meet this weird man, he has the powers of a vampire but is alive.. He said he live near Los Angeles if you ever needed help.
records.plot_goals: #1. Prove your worth, though tests and trials. No one can beat your skill now. #2. Try to make contacts with the Archons, to start in roads for you to become one as well. #3. Now that your in the Camarilla, never let them forget you could just as easily leave, if they treat you poorly.

records.player: Justin Wynne Benti CS, EH, K. P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
You were never a good person, taking what you wanted was just the way things were just the way things were. When you were pressed in to a pirate ship you did not resist, you had found your brothers. Your skill with the blade increased, as your reputation did as well. One night when on watch you saw a boat drifting in the sea. Silently sailing to it, you boarded it, looking for booty. The moment one of the crew went below decks hell rose out of them. Vampires burst out drinking their full and converting the others, their ritual to convert was to strap a newly embraced member to the anchor, and wait an hour for their humanity to be bled out of them. The new vampires were sent to attack ship after ship of the camarilla, your bothers would fall 10 in one blow, but not you. You quickly learned your new skills and after 2 months there was only 3 of you left. You were brought in to the Sabbat though the rituals of the blood pact as a reward before the ship took port. While in a moment you loved your brothers you also feared them. 
As the ship was tied to the mooring, you jumped and ran. It feels like you have never stopped. If you are caught you will be killed, and that fear wakes you in blood sweat every night. For protection you have decided to live with the foes of those who hunt you. Killing a less experienced member of the Assamites, you took his identify as your new sire, learning the laws and trying to become too valuable to be disbelieved.  You had made a place for yourself in the courts of Dubai, sometimes as an enforcer, some time as just a simple problem solver. That was until the night that you saw one of the men from the ship walking the streets, that night you got on a plane to Los Angeles, hoping that the other side of the world would be far enough to run.
records.contacts: #1 Scott Davenport (Toreador) An expert martial artist who’s movies you have loved for years. #2 April Ueltshci (Ventrue) You met her in the court of Istanbul, while you where running, even though you have only met twice, she has a bewitching look that you have never forgotten. #3 Heifa Quan (NPC Seneschal, of Dubai) A good source of advice and information, keeping up good relations is vital to keep your cover safe.
records.plot_goals: #1. Find a way to clear yourself of blood ritual of the Sabbat maybe the full bond to a powerful vampire can over come it. #2. Find some way to change your physical form, so you can hide better.  #3. Make such a place for yourself in los angeles, that no one looks in to your past.

records.player: Ragin Branch CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
As a young child you loved the game of hide and seek. The thrill of being hunted and turning the tables with you being the hunter satisfied you more then anything. It did not take long for your homeland to become a warzone, and as a Croats you took up arms, your faith in Allah and faith of your father and your fathers father had to be preserved. You took your game of hide and seek to another level and it became all the more addictive when death was on the line. By luck or patience you got better, and better. Some might say too good, your reputation grew to the point that you were no longer being hunted just by humans. One night you found your snipers nest, and looked down the sight. Only to be shocked as there was another person in your nest with you. You talked the night away, he told you of powers to hide from men’s minds just by thinking, the skill of centuries at your grasp. All you had to do was follow him.
He took you to Lebanon deep in the desert, Were you trained with your fellow recruits, many also who where of the faith.  You were trained hard for 10 years, and then brought in to the Assamites. You took your contacts, the blood tithe all of it was more and more of the childish game. Then everything changed; your sire told you that we were now all criminals, the father clan hunted you now.
Contacting some of the people who you had done missions for in the past, you found a place in the Camarilla in New Orleans. You felt safe for a moment; you had a group of brothers with you, and got lazy. 
In a matter of 3 nights, the Children of Haqim came down on your people, 2 the first died the first night, killed in a flash. 4 the next, you stood with your brothers until you were alone. Your childish instincts kicked in. You hid. You saw them examine the bodies, and you ran. You ran for a few years, then came the call to come to Los Angels, there are other Assamites here you must protect.
records.contacts: #1 Mary Fay Satterfield (Brujha) A southern bell that you had heard of in the courts of New Orleans. #2 Frenando Mosqueda (Nosferantu) He is a human smuggler you have heard of, he might help getting more of your clan safely to the city. #3 Nicko Maroocs (NPC Assamite) Your sire has connections with others of our kine, he tries to keep things safe, any help you can give him will be returned in kind.
records.plot_goals: #1. Support the Islamic community, and from them try to find new members to replace those you have lost. #2. Gather allies to hunt down any Child of Haquim before they can kill you. #3.Find protections for your clanmates, maybe ally up with the worst foes of your enemies the tremere.

records.player:
C, EH, P
Erick
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: Young Turkish orphan, dreamer of great glories.  Abandoned as a child in the mid 1700's on the streets of Antioch, taken into service by his master Koca Yusuf Pasha, a future Grand Vizier of the Ottoman Empire.  He proved his worth in multiple ways, precise, determined, and dedicated to his master.  He was given a potion by his master (vamp blood) each day after reaching manhood.  He was sent to learn from a secret school in the hinterlands of Albania on his 30th birthday.  (Assamite training camp)  He was inducted to the clan, but he never lost his gratitude to his domitor and master.  He hates Ur-Shulgi and all who stand with him, Allah is the one god, he long ago reconciled blood drinking, but as a warrior he is in service to Allah first and his current master second.
records.contacts:
#1 April Ueltschi (Ventrue) Kindred Geneologist among the Clan of Kings, she may be a key to finding a descendant of the prophet for your place of worship.                                                                        
#2 Aarif Al-Wasdea (Assamite Sorcerer) He is of the faith, a scholar and wise man of your clan, a sorcerer who rejected Ur-Shulagi's insane demands and came to LA to serve Allah                                                                        
#3 Cayleb Hayflick (Brujah) childe of Abdellatif Ben Ammarou a noted scholar of the Brujah in Tunisia, if his child is anything like his sire he seeks the perfection of paradise on earth (golconda)
records.plot_goals:
"#1 Establish yourself in the vipers nest with a place of power #2 
Deliberate with your clanmates, and seek the ways of peace, prepare for 
the ways of war with your clanmates, you are beset on all sides. #3 Make
 a house of worship for Allah, and have it blessed by the greatest Imans
 and a descendant of the Prophet."

records.player: Christopher Daly CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
You did what you were told, You got strait A’s, You got in to Harvard, hell you graduated Harvard, but it did not take you any effort. When you got out you were all set up to start at Goldman Sacks, but you were done. You just started walking. You learned more about yourself, that first time you gave half of your hamburger to a stray dog, the harmony of hearing the loons at night. You learned you were not just a paper of accomplishments you were a man who could love and care. You wanted to become one with the earth, to live off the land. You got cabin, and lived there for 2 years. One day a traveler came at night and he shared your fire. After a week he embraced you, stayed with you a week taught you the ways and then left, Saying to meet him in November 2015 in los angeles. 

So you traveled, you learned the ways, you made friends, some cam some not, some vampire some not, the leaving of the gangrel did not bother you, but now that you must return to the city. You know some members of the new promise mandurate, but you are trying to keep it under wraps. 

Your werewolf friends told you that an evil has entered the city with all the new vampires, and that if you can’t cleanse it they must do so, a temple to the wyrm has been built.
records.contacts: #1 Dafne Pictor (Tremere) A religious woman, and a mystic, who might be able to help you find the temple. #2 Joel Ainsworth (Toreador) He reminds you of the life you would have lived if you had not just started walking, maybe you can give him some freedom now. #3 Double Ram Slot (NPC Glass Walker) this is the werewolf who told you about the wyrm temple. Contact him if you learn anything.
records.plot_goals: #1. Find about the Temple, and get people who will work to destroy it.  #2. Try to learn if the court would be willing to talk to NPM members. #3. Gain a voice for gangrel in this court.

records.player: Mary Poplin CS, EH, K. P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
You were always the girl that no, was never an option. Just look pretty and find a man was an insult to your abilities. You got your masters in chemistry, on a sports scholarship. When you went home after graduating, your parents just kept bringing men over to try to get you married. You were not opposed to the idea of guys or marriage, but you could not get the idea that you were not good enough out of your head. So you moved to the first job you could get out of your town, you worked in the Medical Examiners office from there, you kept pushing yourself, from that to the FBI, to SWAT training to being a leader in your field. 
With all your cases there was one that you could not just let be. A bloody ashy human outline with no accelerants found at all. You knew this was the case that if it broke would take you to the next level. As you where looking though some of the evidence, a shooter, walked in and sprayed the room with autopistol fire. You passed out as the bullets passed though your body. You woke up in the ICU, with only one man sitting on a chair next to you. He explained to you how this was the final promotion. You had the true ability to control your destiny.  He would teach you much in the next few weeks, the Camarilla, the nature of you new form, how to thrive. Then he said he would see you again in 11 years in Los Angeles.  You have not wasted your time, you have become a valuable member of the Camarilla. It bothers you that your clan is not given equal ranking while you can’t fix it world wide maybe you can fix it in your sphere of influence. You came to LA early waiting for your sire to get in contact with you this November.
records.contacts: #1 Alexander Baird (Brujah) He has worked in a lot of courts, but seems cursed some how to never thrive.. #2 Nathaniel Johnson (Ventrue) A crime boss you had been looking for in your mortal days, finding him in the vampire world is not surprising. #3 Frank Baker (NPC) This is your contact at the LA FBI office, he has been of help in some cases but you think there is something secret about him as well.
records.plot_goals: #1. Try to get representation for the gangrel, though the proof of your abilities. #2. Prepare for your sires return; make sure he has an acknowledgement. #3. Learn about the enemies of the Camarilla in this city.

records.player: Ed Fox CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
You were a strong member of your Tribe, You raided well, and enjoyed the simple joys of hearth and home. But on one raid you were distracted, and a farmers pitchfork pierced your leg. It seemed like a simple thing but the festering grew and you soon became delirious. You made it back home, and your kin took you to the ancient shaman who knew the mysteries of the land and the sea. Your family failed you, the doorway to Valhalla was there, and the sorcerer pulled you back.  His potions, made you in to a shadowalker, unable to bask in the light. Over the centuries he told you of his people, blessed by a kinslayer. That his special powers came from a book, ancient even when he was born. He never let you see it inside but you will never forget it’s cover. 
Over time you yearned for lands beyond, and it seemed everywhere people had need for a strong back and a sharp blade, the crusades, the horde, the age of pirates, the conquering of the American west all wars that you have made your mark. You would learn and forget tonghes in a matter of months. Everywhere people are the same. The only one different was the sorcerer who pulled you in. He had the spark of life in him while the powers of death, no other shadowalker has had his smell. 
One night you awoke from torpor and there was a group of campers, watching a TV, you spied from the woods waiting for your moment to strike. Then you saw it. On the screen was a documentary showing the book of your sire. How it has never been translated but it is dated to the 4th century. But more importantly it is currently held in a secure exhibit of the Getty Museum in Los Angeles. As this has become less a time of warriors, you know you need help to acquire it, and translate it.
records.contacts: #1 Aarif Al-Wasdea (Assamite) A Bedouin warrior you met during the great war. You saved his life, durring the battle of Aqubua. #2 Isha Parikh (Tremere) A famous translator, if anyone in los angeles can find an answer to the book she can. #3 Albert Voss (NPC head curator over the book) He as spent his whole life learning about the book, but you will have to find a way to talk to him without him knowing of your vampirism.
records.plot_goals: #1. Acquire and get the book translated. After you have the book gain an apprentice like you were to Maku, maybe that is needed to unlock its secrets. #2. Your people seem mistreated here try to aid them as best as you can. #3. Try learn a needed talent other then just killing. Mankind finally has made peace in their homes, change with these new times.

records.player: Paul Walker CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You and your twin brother (Jake) after the war could not stop the desire to keep moving, for a while bikes kept you two excided, but that did not pay the bills. Then you started shipping drugs for some biker gangs, and that moved it to being full on smugglers. Traveling with your brother never seemed lonely and you even did some normal shipping if the price was right. One night you went to go get some groceries, and you where attacked. You were made in to a vampire that night, your sire kept you locked in a cave when he taught you the basics. In a week, though your brother found you. He walked in as your sire was trying to teach you about ghouling. Your bother put the end of a double barrel shotgun, on your sire’s head and fired. You two ran for years, Hiding from other vampires, finding your blood where you could. You kept him ghouled so he would never age, and he would act as you during the day. Things were going well until, one day you wanted to deliver a package but the person never showed up. You opened the package, and it was a book, with a ritual in it that by the mystical destruction of one vampire per decade of destruction, the writer of the book, is Paul the Herald of Crete. After talking to some contacts you heard he is heading to LA, so following the trail of the book, you and your brother moved to LA.
records.contacts: #1 Marco del Juro (Ventrue) A famous arms dealer you have shipped some of his wares to hard to get areas in the past, he might help you now integrate with this new city.  #2 Gloria Edwards (Tremere) You had some friends in San Jose who spoke well of her, its not a strong connection, but she is tremere, and the only people who are likely to understand what they book really can do.  #3 Fernando DuBois (Toreador) You have a package to ship to him as well. You don’t know the sender, you were not payed.. maybe he might pay for an unknown package.. if not maybe someone else will but you chose not to open it until he had the first crack at it.\
records.plot_goals: #1 Find out if the book does what it says. Maybe sell it, maybe wait till Paul comes to la and give it to him.  #2 Find a place in the city for you this is the first time your not going to be moving so, you need all the backup you can get.  #3 find a way to break the bond your brother has while keeping him a ghoul, having your brother love you that much is a bit weird.

records.player: Walter Sherwood CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
He is like a lapsed Catholic with his search for Golconda, his habits of violence tempered by a search for perfection and redemption.

Joined the army as a butterball Lieutenant in summer of 1940 right out of Purdue.  Fought your way across Africa and then up through Italy, was shot twice, stabbed twice, beaten at least a dozen time, and still has pieces of shrapnel in him. After the war mustered out as a Captain and settled in Tunis, Tunisia, made friends with an older gentleman named Abdellatif who came by the café Caleb settled in at the end of the war. They became friends and discussed the weighty events and issues of the world, as well as the secrets of man’s heart and motivations.   Abdellatif offered Caleb time to master his own demons and to discover the secrets of the heart. Caleb was embraced on a warm summer eve in 1955 looking to the sea. He spent the years in discourse with his sire, conversation with his sires friends and allies, and searching through tomes and journals.  Sadly his search for inner peace and enlightenment was marred by his violence.  Caleb, is prone to react violently to thing outside of his control, it is a source of unhappiness to him, but also denied even to himself a visceral satisfaction when he smashes a problem or opposition. His sire sent him back to the America’s in the mid 1990’s as he felt the pull of torpor.  Caleb returned to his hometown of Cleveland, and from there moved around the Midwest every few years.  His sire did indeed fall into Torpor, and then arose again in 2014. When he awoke he contacted Caleb and feverishly described a coming crusade and a means to master the beast and make of it a loving part of ones psyche.  That methodology was in LA, and a being named Rob Santaly would be his enlightenment.
records.contacts: #1 Nathan Mcallister (Gangrel) They met 10 years ago in Colorado Springs. You had seen a Gangrel that matched his sires description. #2 Sal Thompson (Malkavian) He was your favorite writer as a young man,  his stories were so vivid and real. #3 Markus O’Linn (Brujah) He is an unrepentant violent man and Caleb is jealous.  They have met a few times in the Midwest. #4 Abdellatif Ben Ammarou (Brujah Sire) Still in Tunis, Tunisia, but he calls you every few days to chat and see how you are doing.
records.plot_goals: #1. Find out about Rob Santaly and where he might be or how to contact him. #2. Talk to your clan and determine the health of their psyche’s. #3.  Acquire a sample of blood from another clan, your sire has asked you for “a taste of LA” to assist him with his visions.

records.player: Hugo Guzman CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
Just because your born poor does not mean you should not have hope!

Markus is the son, grandson, great grandson, and great great grandson of Irish Men at Arms.  He took up the cause when his lord did and like his lord he fled with the Jacobites in 1691. He never gave thought to giving up service, it just is not how he thinks.  His lord and the rest of the guard joined one of the irish bands on the continent and took up the trade of the mercenary, ‘till tha Stuart canna call us baick!”.  Ghouled on the eve of a battle in 1704 when he surprised his future sire in the night air. He survived the battle where he should not have, shot through two times, and left for dead, his future sire pulled him from the pile of bodies and led him away from his fallen lord and fellows.  He followed his sire to the America’s in the early 1800’s first in the United States and then in Mexico. Sought and got permission from his sire to fight with the San Patricio’s in the Mexican American War.  Embraced on the eve of disaster, at the end of the Mexican American War when the San Patricios had lost. Has been in service to several princes over the years with his sire. His sire departed for Europe three years ago with a promise to return in a few years, leaving Markus with a few contracts to fulfill.  Markus has been directly recruited to LA by Pictor (Tremere) as a known loyal commodity as they have had dealings before.
records.contacts: #1 Alexander Baird (Brujah) You have met before and consider each other loyal to the appropriate things. #2 Caleb Hayflick (Brujah) You have met a few times in the past few decades in the midwest. #3 Yuri Luzhko(Nosferatu) He is a go to guy when you need to buy information.  #4 Dafne Pictor (Tremere) she has arranged jobs for you in the past through her chantry/regent.  Now she seeks to arrange a job directly. #5 Donnal Dunsirn (Giovanni, Not in Game) they have been trading information back and forth for over a two centuries.  Their sires introduced them to each other.
records.plot_goals: #1.  See what Dafne wants, negotiate for the best deal possible #2.  Establish a unified front and do not let the clan be used for no gain. #3.  Make contact with Yuri and set up a deal.

records.player: Monique Gonzalez CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
The love of the lord is very personal; if you try and get between he and I again I will have my man feed you your own anus!

Paulina, fourth daughter of a minor lord in Rome.  She was sold by her family as homage to the church, placing her in a Carmelite Nunnery.  Fortunately for her sake she had the calling a very strong personal faith. Unfortunately she was placed in a position where her Abbess was not very devout, had debts, and had sold her soul to a demon.  Paulina was sold to cover some of those debts when she witnessed a rather depraved ritual involving a demon, a human sacrifice, and sacrilegious sex with nuns in the Abbey.  She was sold to a fighting pit in Padua run by demon worshipers and Baali, she was ghouled and fought for over 100 years.  She quickly lost track of the time, and her previous nice and quiet nature, changed to a cold hard shell of thick armor
surrounding her cares, feelings, and soul. Through it all she did not give up on god.  Then one day the cells were stormed by fighting men and the masters were all killed. The man leading the attack was a Brujah, he remembered the nights when they joined the Assamites, and cleared the nests.  He recognized in a few of the gladiator slaves they could be useful and tested them, those that passed he took into his service back in his principality of Zagreb. Her sire was originally from Venice, sent to secure the Dalmatian coast he did better than asked, and when he was embraced he “died of the plague” and took a princedom in the lands he had controlled for Venice.  She served him in any way needed, a faithful agent and steward of his household and personal affairs.  Embraced in the 1700’s she continued in that capacity for her sire until now when sent to LA.  She is in LA for the Money, Land, Power, Information, and lastly because her sire's orders.
records.sire: Giovanni Orseolo, Prince of Zagreb, Croatia
records.contacts: #1 Shari Rosenthal (Malk) she was a skilled Noddist scholar and several long talks were had in the past, why is she here, and does she still study. #2 Samuel Baird (Nos) He is a very skilled computer person, he can make magic with those machines.  #3 Laura Alvarado (Toreador) you have met at several salons over the years, she is cultured and has manners. #4 James Perkins (venture) until recently a ghoul to a powerful prince, a weasely little shit of a vampire.
records.plot_goals: #1.  Investigate rumors of demon worship in the city. #2.  Deliver a concise report of the city and its goings on to your sire #3.  Make two allies among other clans.

records.player: Laura Bishop CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
Men, Faugh! They are walking violent egos, they need to be controlled. 

Madeleine was born and raised in Rotterdam in the late 1870’s, daughter of a wealthy merchant.  She was raised indulgently and educated quite well, her father had plans to marry her above her station and elevate the family.  She was known to attend salons where radical ideas were discussed, and soon fell into a free thinking crowd that even went so far as to push for voting rights for women.  She latched onto this cause, currently battling her father over his ideas of an arranged marriage.  Madeleine spent her time getting deeper into the cause (dutch women vote in 1919), and took part in the League of Nations efforts to spread the franchise.  She toured Europe for years, taking part in rallies and debates, and speeches.  She found herself in Poland in 1928, when she was pulled from a train and raped repeatedly for days, several men saw it, and several men who did not partake in the rapes, knew what was going on in the back of the village tavern.  None did anything.  She came to with the visage of a wizened old crone leaning over her.  “I can kill you dear, or I can make you strong enough to protect women from this, it is your choice my dear?”  She took strength and protection and has never looked back.  Her strength is her conviction, and yes she has met men and vampires alike who support and do not denigrate women, but they are never the ones in charge.  Those in power always put women “in their place” and are users.  Madeleine heard about what was happening in LA and of two opportunities.  The first being that for the first time, Clan Tremere could be advocating a female led Chantry that was an actual important city. A new court means a new outlook more than a third of the vamps coming to LA are female (she has helped spread the word to as many women as possible), she has the chance to urge a female court, or at least controlled.
records.contacts: #1 Angela Malone (Brujah)  You met this young vamp a year ago, and made sure she heard about the activity in LA, she has fire and determination.  She can be LA’s new female blood. #2 Zhao "John" Leji (Ventrue) Brothel owner and Pimp, he is a user through and through.  You and others who think like you do have had him in their sights for years.  #3 Paulina Catalanotti (Brujah) You have heard of her, an elder with Stockholm syndrome, abused by men and still sitting at their knees like a dog.  Lets hope she can change and develop some spirit. #4 Dr. Valeire Penza (Malk) a key researcher in the effects of the embrace on the psych, maybe she can be of assistance in psyche profiles and therapy to strengthen the female vamps minds.
records.plot_goals: #1. Gain three minor boons from different males in the court #2. Open a womens shelter, the bigger the better #3. Put a woman outside of your clan in a position of power

records.player: Ray Lavoie CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
A man’s oath is only as valuable as the salt of his lord!

Scottish, Roman Catholic, Jacobite, a tad mental with anachronistic mannerisms and speech. Embraced in 1746, a year after the uprsing of '45 and the flight of "Bonnie Prince Charlie", his sire needed another soldier and a loyal retainer as he was proving to be was it. He was a ferociously loyal man in life and his demands of honor are ferouciously loyal in death. Is obsessed with ensuring that his "Prince" (Whomever he chooses to follow) will not fall as all the others have. Charles Stuart fled, Prince Brewster of Plymouth England died in Praxis challenge (you were sheriff), Lord Murray your Sire fell weakly to Torpor, Prince Vincenzo Caporelli of Belluno Italy died (you were primogen), and most recently Prince Kyle Unletherb of Amarillo, Texas died (you were sheriff). He has lost the last two princes to the Sabbat and has a major hate on for them. He is in LA because his friend and ally Markus O'Linn asked him to come, he was at loose ends but seeks to unite the Brujah into a fine company, and will most likely try to put forward a leader for him to follow.
records.contacts: #1 Markus O’Linn (Brujah) You and he have met before, you and he see eye to eye on matters of honor. #2 Marco del Juro (Ventrue Elder) He is a noted weapons mogul in clan venture, he and or his organization have funded and armed several of the conflicts you have been in in the past 40 years. #3 Constanza (Toreador) (out of game) Prince of Palm Springs, you were working for her last year as her scourge.  She released you cordially when you asked. #4 Adam Black (Nosferatu) (out of game) you and adam have traded favors and information several times over the years. #5 Gregor Merkel (Tremere)  Used to be a Nazi Mystic of some type
records.plot_goals: #1. Establish a unified clan in LA,  and secure yourself as the moral authority for your clan.  #2. Establish a Clan Haven where you can watch out for the younglings #3.  Ensure that the Sheriff’s office is the minimum award to your clan, Seneschal and Sheriff would be much better.

records.player: Ashley Scarborough CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
This bitch aint no one’s property!

Pretty little Angela, she made some really poor choices. She ran away with her "bad boy" at 16, ended up on the back of a bike for a few years, for several different "protectors". Found herself in a bar serving drinks in Atlanta and worked her way through a few "protectors" there. Then one day she finally walked down the wrong ally and woke up with a terrible thirst buried under some dirt, she scrabbled around and swore she felt other people moving in the loose dirt as well, then she broke through the top. Some man with a shovel, a smile, and one snaggle toothed nasty grin was leering at her as she climbed up and out. She was made to drink their blood, attack people she did not know, and sleep in a huddle during the day.  She was told she was dead, a vampire, and if she was worthy Caine would bless her and she would live through this.  She got a rather halfhearted training with the other shoveleheads and was thrown into the conflict.  She snapped, she had enough of this shit, enough of men, women, or anyone telling her she was trash, a whore, worthless, white trash, whatever the fucking label she was Angela and she was fucking mad. She laid into the  snaggly guy one day a few weeks later and floored him in surprise, next thing she new she came to covered in blood and feeling full and powerful, she had frenzied and diablerized him. The vaulderie was voided in frenzy, she had unintentionally broken her slavery.  She was lucky, she was found by a camarilla brujah running from the fighing in the siege of Atlanta as she was wandering in a daze.  He captured her to get info and when he got the story, he was just amused.  He kept her.  And for maybe the first time someone she stayed with didn’t abuse her, fuck her life, or just fuck her over. Over the next few years as they traveled the midwest he taught her what she needed to know to survive in the cam.  She became a skilled Sabbat fighter and has skills to offer in that.  That go getter attitude will help against the sellouts to the Asians as well. Her adopted sire was killed by a hotel fire in Minnesota last year, leaving her loose of all ties. She heard about something going on in LA and decided to head there, after all it has been almost 16 years since she saw her parents and brother.
records.contacts: #1 Madeleine Pelletier (Brujah)  You saw her last year, and you heard her talking about the opportunities in LA, sounded good. #2 Samuel Baird (Nosferatu) this was actually the ugly old guy that ran the computer shop your dad went too. #3 Lucas “Cool Hand Luke”  Jackson (Toreador) this guy rocks, he is the best stage magician and escape artist ever, hes great. #4 Donnal Dunsirn (Giovanni) (out of game) You know you should not talk about him with other people, he can get you stuff, and has offered his assistance if you ever need help and are willing to sell out.
records.plot_goals: #1.  Get a Protector, the biggest maddest protector out there. Someone to watch your back while you kick Sabbat, KOE, and Anarch ass. #2.  Learn more about this power of  the Lasombra (Obtenebration),  and how to use it against your enemies (get Obtenebration level 3) #3.  You know, there is no prince yet, It is a perfect time to diablerize someone and get away with it.  I hear Toreador taste great. #4. Put yourself forward as a Sabbat expert, get control of any team about the Sabbat

records.player: Herschel Brodie Aberson CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: LA born, raised to be a gang banger but ended up taking a community organizer route instead of falling into the gangs. His work gets him noticed by an Anarch, and he is taken as a ghoul in LA. Lupo figured out early on that he wasn't susceptible to the blood blond like other people were.  His domitor at the time unnamed Anarch) was okay with this, and they kept his secret while Lupo served and learned how to fake the appearance of a Bond.  Despite being immune himself, he sees how terrible the bond is for others, and eventually finds himself initiated in the Unbound  when his domitor is killed off (or is otherwise made unavailable) and he needs help finding his next fix.  He joins the effort to identify ghouls who could be separated from their domitors and sent to "detox" for the year needed to break the bond.  On a self-assigned mission to open up more than one route for the railroad to send liberated ghouls, he heads east to Palm Springs.  Under cover as a community organizer, he again catches the eye of a vampire (this time, Baird).  Baird ghouls him and Lupo pretends he is bound as a way into the local vampire scene to find more potential people to liberate.  Ends up being embraced without realizing where things are going, and finds himself in the other side of the Masquerade.  In his initial optimism, he thinks this will let him help the underground railroad a great deal by being a 5th Column inside the Vampire Establishment.  We will see how long he can resist the temptation and corruption being undead inevitably causes.

records.player: SanDee O'Dell
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You were the faceless mob at so many rallies. You marched for equality, civil rights, ERA act, Gay rights, AIDS, anti reagan, peace, anti vietnam, you name it.  You marched, sang, donated, believed.  In 1982, you were diagnosed with the 'gay cancer' - AIDS. Facing your own mortality, you met a man who offered you a chance to keep the fight strong, and not let your voice be silenced like so many others. You accepted, driven both by a desire to avoid the reaper and to keep the fight going. Though your sire saved your life, he could not entirely restore you - you still carry the deadly HIV virus in your blood.
records.plot_goals:
#1 You believe in the cause with a fervent harshness you use to fill 
your nights, make sure one of the causes of equality in LA or or the 
underdogs is yours #2  Find allies in the cause, others who believe it 
is not all about being the most powerful, others who believe in 
supporting the underdog.  #3 If The Court of LA wont help, then find 
allies outside the court.

records.player: Sean Kuykendall C,EH, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: A proud educated man, first in his family to ever graduate high school, joined the State Dept. and got a great job at the French Embassy.  The year was 1903 and nothing could get better.  And it didn't.  Alfons walked into a street fight, two groups of students fighting by the canals in Paris.  He did not see the brick that laid him out, the next thing he knew he was in a cramped apartement with a handsome young student and it was late at night.  "So you were drawn to our argument, our squabble, our cause.  Let me show you what it is all about.  My name is Louis."  And he fed him the blood and that was that. Alfons was a ghoul until the Nazi's came to Paris, his domitor embraced him, to better survive the run to the channel away from those Tremere bastards.  He has been serving the clan (and anyone else with a beef and money) battling the Tremere since.  Alfons never had a real goal or cause, hes a heartless mercenary poser, who has decided the money is in hating the tremere.  Hes a caricature of someone who has depth, he has none, and he is intensly afraid that someone will find out he is so fake.

records.player: Aly Nova Rubino CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: I was born to a fairly well-to-do family in 1865, in New York City. My childhood was a nightmare. I could not understand the compulsions I had nor could I ignore them. I had to count my steps. I had to arrange things just so. As I grew older, it got worse and worse. My parents, in their ignorance, tied me to my bed and shot me full of drugs. An endless parade of physicians threw up their hands in frustration. Eventually, even my parents gave up and I was committed to an asylum.  The thought that removal of stimulus would help, but I still paced my cell and rearranged my food. Eventually, he found me. Dr. Thomas Everett, whom I was told as a famous physician, was coming to study my case. He was warm and charming. When he looked at me, I could help feel as though my soul was transparent before him. He reversed my sensory deprivation and gave me books, ink and paper. He told me to read and write down everything I wanted. Free of my family’s fearful looks, and all the time in the world to delve into my obsessions, I unwittingly became his master pupil. I learned languages, legends, secrets. I was able to see patterns and connections far beyond the pompous notes of historical scholars. And when I proved myself a master pupil, he embraced me in the year of our Lord: 1888. The decades that followed were a whirlwind of research and travel. I’ve walked between the Tigris and Euphrates. I’ve seen the pyramids at midnight. I’ve breathed in the scent of ancient tomes. The story of the Cainite race, or “Kindred” as we are supposed to call ourselves, is like a black thread that has been woven into the tapestry of human existence. We have always been there, intertwined but difficult to notice. So much has been forgotten, and I was determined to discover it all. Noddist lore was declared heresy, my sire went to ground. Though I was accused, I was sufficiently insolated by his machinations, to weather the storm. Though he asked me to discontinue my own research, I knew I could not. The truth must be found. The truth must be known to all. I will find it, and I will show them all.

records.plot_goals: #1. You have continued your heretical Noddist research and have followed rumors of a slumbering ancient to Los Angeles. You feel it could be a Methuselah or even an antediluvian. Regardless, you must discover the truth without getting caught by the powers that be. #2. Hiding in plain sight seems the best course of action. If you can sell yourself as a Kindred historian and loyal advisor, perhaps you can avoid suspicion.#3. You must build a discreet information network. Most of your work will need to be done by proxy and thus, loyal allies are essential.

records.player: Carla Dickerson CS,  EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: Growing up in Chicago in the late 70’s, was like being in the middle of a musical multi-car pile-up. The carcass of blues based, formulaic family tree was rotting away. The responsibility rejecting, coke fueled dance bunnies were getting their Disco snorts. It wasn’t until the likes of Ultravox, Depeche Mode, and the glory of the singing machines came into the limelight that I truly gave a shit. More than that; it was an awakening. I was all in. Rubber bracelets, fishnets, teased hair. It was my scene. As a child I had a natural affinity for piano. My ear was so good, I could play along to cartoon themes even before I understood what I was doing. But electronics, man. Now you didn’t just hit a note. You could bend it, stretch it, garble it up or make it sound truly alien. It set my creative mind on afterburner and I cranked out masterpiece after masterpiece. It spoke to me. Not in the way some poser with a paintbrush says the Mona Lisa speaks to him. The trills and sweeps, they spoke to me; deep in my brain I saw threads that interlocked with others. I heard a muffled cacophony of voices speaking… history? I didn’t really understand then. And no, it wasn’t acid.By the early 90’s, I was DJing underground raves and passing out tape mixes of my stuff. It was a never-ending dance party bus, and I was the driver. One August night in 1994, in some warehouse outside of Cleveland, I made out with the weirdest guy. No one ever talked about my music like he did. No one aside from me. I was 24 and thought I knew everything, but he understood my music on a level that even I didn’t. He embraced me that night and introduced me to a new, terrifying depth of understanding. The things I used to see in the music, the voices; they are all clear as day now. The only “day” I’ll ever see. The music is still the core of my being. And now the L.A. is open territory, of course I had to go. It’s Mecca to the music monsters, right?
records.contacts: #1 Marcus Jonak (Toreador) the top movie producer in los Angeles, if he can’t get your suff out there no one can. #2 Gregor Merkel (Tremere) You saw him at a rave with a bunch of neo-natzi’s those guys party hard but the also might be great for your passing your music around and not taking no for an answer. #3 Paulina Catalanotti (Brujha) an old soul with some older songs, she what she has to say about your music.
records.plot_goals: #1. Someone has to open these people’s minds to the truth between the notes and beats and that’s you. But you need a place for that. Start up your own club, or take one over. Make it the biggest thing in L.A. #2. You need to spread the message too. Find talent. Exploit talent. Guide talent. No one will understand them more than you. Make some music industry connections and get their music out there. #3. Of course, you’re going to need money to make all this happen. Find investors and partners that share your vision. Or at least pretend to share a vision just long enough to let the ink dry on the check.

He was embraced in the mid 1950's by a sire who was captivated by the beauty of numbers.  Came to LA as part of his world tour of schools famous for their mathematics professors and programs (cal tech in this case).  He usually spends two years exploring all the school  has to offer before looking to move on. While he is here he has been contacted by a mysterious man and presented a conundrum, he murdered the seneschal of Prague in a frenzy in 1994 during a debate on prime numbers.  He was never accused of the crime and was able to move on succesfuly, but now he has been shown a video of the act that which clearly identifies him. He does not know who is blackmailing or for what yet.

records.player: Lilly Daly CS EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: In 1966 Timothy Leary told us to “Turn on, tune in, drop out”. But I wasn’t some lost college kid. I had degrees in chemistry and psychology and was empowered by the free thinking of the era. So perhaps I couldn’t drop out, but I did turn on and tune in. I applied science to the philosophy that mind-expanding substances could elevate human consciousness. After all, shamans had been following the practice for thousands of years. They key was finding the right one. Despite the fringe nature of my research, I nonetheless found funding at the hands of Leary’s associates and a mystery benefactor. The key to “ascension”, as I like call it, eluded me as my friends and patrons began to straighten up, fleeing the country, or dying of excess. I myself was on the brink of breaking as my obsession became desperation. That is when my mystery benefactor found me and bestowed upon me true ascension.Julius Windham, my sire, shattered the limiting lenses I had over my eyes. While drugs showed me the chaos subsumed beneath the ordinary, the embrace gave means to see the patterns within. The chaos could be understood and read like a book. I was overjoyed at this gift and pledged to share it with the world. But you cannot populate a world with Kindred. That in impractical. Moreover, Kindred are flawed in their own way. I will find the path to the ascension of the human race. The secret is in my blood, and it will reveal itself to me in time. My research inexplicably unnerves my fellow Kindred. I find myself needing to move often. I don’t understand it, but I bare them no ill will. Perhaps my brethren in Los Angeles will be more understanding.

records.player: Lawrence Enriquez CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: For God and Country I went marching off to war. My patriotic fervor was all but spent when I reached front lines of the Somme offensive. Somewhere in those trenches, swimming through the blood and viscera of friend and foe; I became a monster. Going forward, I wasn’t commanded by my officers, I was unleashed; for I had no regard for life (mine or otherwise). I would stalk the enemy trenches. They didn’t expect a single lunatic to bring death to their doorstep. I reveled in it. This slaughter was not for Britannia, it was sacrifice for something darker within me. It was on one of these excursions that I came across a man with eyes as wild as my own. He did not shrink from me as the Germans instinctively would do. He leapt at me and with supernatural strength, dragged me to a nearby cave. For the rest of that night, he taught me what a monster truly was. He cut me, bled me. He showed me the Beast, before I could fully comprehend. Finally, he embraced me. It was the only way I could grasp the depths of my depravity–to see the monster I’d become. Once again, I found myself the sword of nameless masters. When I would teeter over the edge of the abyss, my sire did just enough to pull me back. It finally dawned on me that I would never be anything more than a monster, if I didn’t go off on my own. So I left my sire in search of this Golconda I’d heard rumors over. For decades I have travelled the world in search of knowledge and teachers. While I have had some success, I still have a long road to travel. I have come to Los Angeles in search of scholars and lore. Perhaps I will find what I need to take another step forward on the road to Golconda.

records.plot_goals: #1. Seek out scholars and lore related to Golconda. #2. Find a way to serve the city without compromising your ideals. #3. Strive to recapture your lost humanity.

records.player: Sheldon Robert Morely CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: During the depression, Boston was the kind of town that could eat you alive. I was a young reporter trying to cover the struggle of everyday people; to bring awareness to the suffering those folks in the ivory towers had grown numb to. I don’t know, maybe I’d grown numb to it too. However many starving kids and weeping mothers can you see before something inside you dies? The boss thought that what we really needed was a new perspective. maybe if we reported on the most horrific acts of depravity, the average Joe wouldn’t think his life so bad. I didn’t buy it, but it was my job and I needed to keep it. The problem was that there were too many guys scouring the city for stories, and not enough them to go around. When he threatened to fire me, I decided to take matter into my own hands. I didn’t really have the luxury of starting slow. I decided to try robbing a department store at gunpoint. Of course it ended badly. The only reason I lived was because I pulled the trigger first. As I ran, cash in hand and adrenaline pumping through my veins, I realized that I was exhilarated. Better still, I had a bag of cash and a story to tell. It was all downhill from there. Depravity came as easy to me as typing words on a page. And who would suspect a reporter? One fateful night in 1935, it all came to an end. No, I didn’t have a sudden flash of conscience. I didn’t see the error of my ways. Quite simply, I picked on the wrong lady. She knew. She looked into my heart and knew. That night she created a story of her own, doing things to me that I could never think of. I remember realizing just how much of an amateur I was, as she drained the blood from my body. She wasn’t about to let me die. It was a good thing, in the end. My “gory days” gave me plenty of stories to tell. I sold a bunch of novels thanks to them and no one ever caught on that the things I described were true. That I’d done them with my own hands. Maybe they knew deep down. I mean how can a virgin truly write about making love? L.A.’s a new scene. I’ve had that itch to hunt for stories again. The City of Angels is a pretty grim place; maybe I won’t have to make my own stories this time. That’d be a shame.
records.contacts: #1 Nathaniel Johnson (Ventrue), seems to be the Kindred Kingpin for Organized Crime #2 Bartholomew Douglas (Malkavian) he has horror in his eyes, reacts like a killing machine, but walks like a pacifistic monk #3 Paul Cotte (Toreador) he was a prolific author, now he is stuck with a decade long writers block that only a toreador could have.  Maybe you can show him the way like you learned, make your own stories.
records.plot_goals: #1. Get in good with the underworld of L.A. so you can find those juicy stories you long for. #2. Inspire your fellow Kindred to explore their darker desires. Make sure to write it all down. #3. Just as your sire taught you the meaning of being a monster, find someone young and impressionable to pass that lesson no to.

records.player: Morrigan Rose , EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: The world  is a frightening place. As a child, I would tremble as I walked down the streets. The buildings loomed over me like towering monsters. The people on the streets stalked me like spiders. I feared the sun would burn me. I feared the night would take me. All day; everyday, I lived in fear. My family was wealthy enough to afford my special needs. They were also callous enough to lock me away in institutions whenever I got really bad. By the time I was 16, I was convinced that my only escape from the fear and isolation was death. Three times I tried to take my life. Each time I returned from the abyss with less fear. After the third, I became fear. Anyone that looked into my eyes saw the nothingness inside me. Even my cruel family walked on eggshells around me. They were right to. My thoughts turned from fearing monsters to becoming one. The only way to conquer my fear was to become fear itself. It started small – my siblings started finding their pets mangled in their beds. By the time I was 19, I would dress as innocent and wholesome as I could and wander the streets at night. I would attract the monsters, then turn the tables on them. My first was a would-be rapist whom I left without eyes. The next, a mugger who’s screams I stole with his tongue. Many followed and each made the same mistake of underestimating me. They thought me the victim. I never killed, though. The dead do not know fear. One night, I attracted a different kind of monster. I don’t know if it was coincidence or if Sal was waiting for me, but that night I realized I still had much to learn. Sal and I came to L.A. to explore new ground. I reprised my favorite role as the innocent victim, wandering my new surroundings. This time, I did not find a new kind of monster. I found something familiar: fear. I found brood of wretched souls hiding in the night. They are Kindred but still very human. They are hunted. Killed off like vermin. Victims one and all. These must be the “Thinbloods” that are spoken about in whispers. These pathetic creatures inspire fear in the hearts of elders. They are just children. Fear’s children.
