records.plot_goals: #1. Explore your new city and find the monsters within. #2. Find an outlet for your impulses that is either sanctioned, or well hidden. #3. records.player: Erin Koppel CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
Growing up in Plymouth the sea was your first love, the magic of the waves, the life of it‘s own. When you found a man who was a sea captain while you loved marring him to get on the water was your real goal. On your first journey, you were hit by a hurricane. All hands where lost, but your love the sea protected you. After a few days afloat, you washed ashore on the island of Huku Hiva. The natives had never seen a white person before, and due to the color of your skin they thought you were from the land of the dead. Taking you to their shaman to recover you saw that your beloved see was everywhere. But there was a price to tap in to the sea of souls. You had to catch the fish of the land people, hunt them down with guile, and hook their mouths as you pulled out the meat gutting them and taking the flesh in you opened up your eyes.  
One night when you were on the hunt you saw a light at the sea, a ship was coming to Huku Hiva, Not wanting your teacher to be hurt you swam to the boat and told them of the dangers of the island. The captain decided to look for water elsewhere and 4 years later you were back in England. Your family took you back with open arms, never knowing that your hunts continued. One night after your hunt you saw the ghosts coming in droves singing as a choir. They said the time for you had come, to truly be a mistress of the sea of souls. Your sire came that night, having followed your killing spree. With the powers of the dead in you casting the ancient rituals became easier. Your tribe sees you as a mystic among the mystics. You have traveled far and wide, as your fishing can not stay hidden for long, but Los Angeles, is one of the largest cities in the world, it seems like a good place to start setting up your traps. (Clan Flaw [delusion] You truly believe your power is fueled by death energies not blood. You will not feed on a living person, and any time you cast too many of your powers you will want to ritualize it with a killing)

Your Victorian sensibilities and her southern ones seem like a good match. #3 Alistair St. John (Unknown Vampire NPC) You met Alistair in England, he is also a traveler of the sea of souls, when you arrived in LA, he sent a letter to you wishing you well. He lives on Catalina.
records.plot_goals: #1. Secure, your special needs in feeding. #2. After you trust someone, try to make a coven of speakers to the sea. #3. Learn what you can of other magics of the dead, you know the Tremere keep their secrets well hidden but their must be some that have escaped their net.

records.player: Takashi Shoju
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
You came to Las Vegas in the 1970s, when the city's reputation for seediness and iniquity was at it's height. Working your way up from bell boy to general manager wasn't easy, but you made it. During that time you joined a secret society of managers called the “Society of the Crossed Keys”. They worked together to solve problems one another had. 

Even with this aid, you saw the depths of depravity to which people could sink. Wild parties were the least of it. As your career progressed, you saw everything from people waking up an bathtub of ice missing vital organs, cartel agents trading drugs for people right in your ballroom and busting underage prostitution rings. 

But the worst were the dead people. Sometimes people have a heart attack after a weekend of partying hard in Vegas, things happen. But there were the suicides, the overdoses, the murders. You swore you could hear the dead speaking to you, crying out for justice or vengeance or just the chance to tell their loved ones goodbye. You took to booze to quiet the voices.

And it worked, for a time. But then someone came along who told you the voices were a good thing, and offered you the opportunity to, as she put it, 'change your perspective in radical ways.' You might have declined if you'd known precisely what she was offering, but being a Malkavian isn't so bad. 

You just changed your shift to being the night manager, and your life carried on much the same as before. Until the Giovanni showed up. They bought "your" hotel out from under you (you didn't own it, but couldn't help feeling some ownership of a building you'd spent 40-odd years in), and had no need of a Malkavian night manager. You were let go without even a severance package. Now, you find yourself in need of a new place to live, and have decided the new domain of Los Angeles offers bountiful opportunities. However, your experience as an hotelier has marked you. When confronted with inhumane events or discussions of suffering and pain, your emotions and empathy completely vanish. 

You made a deal with a mysterious figure who gave you the capital to have a controlling interest for a hotel in Los Angeles. He only spoke to you though texts. While that bothered you at first, when the money was delivered. You knew this was your opportunity.

records.player: Michael Steinbach CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: It was the golden age of Hollywood, and I was the new rising star. I was a young, good looking actor rubbing elbows with the elite and surrounded by the sweetest angels of the city. Not that I didn’t deserve it. I studied and suffered. I honed my craft and made myself great. And as much as I loved the scene and the lifestyle, I felt truly fulfilled and alive on a movie set. In those days, every shark in the city wanted to sink their teeth into me. I avoided them all… all but one. Danica was the spider at the center of the web. She had her fingers in every pie in Hollywood and had been quietly guiding my carrier from afar. She spoke of my talent my beauty like you’d talk about a withering rose. It would bring her to tears-the thought that someday I’d grow old, die and my talent lost forever. So that night she made sure that I’d never wither away; and on a rainy November night in 1926, I was embraced. The price for my newfound immortality was great. I could never be a star again. My final, classic performance would be the original Hollywood cliché; to be the young star that would burn out too soon. Still, I managed to find ways to remain in the industry I loved so much. I’ve played the part of director, producer, financier, agent and the occasional extra in the background. Decades later, I find myself questioning all that has happened. My entire life and unlife reads like a script. Maybe I am just a player in someone else’s tour de force. And though my sire denies that we are being manipulated or even inspired by something… bigger than ourselves, her eyes tell a different story.

records.player: Christie Ferreria C, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You grew up in Lynwood in the gangs.  Your entire family was in the gangs and it was the only life you knew. You were rather good at the life, you worked your way up and by the time you were 25, you had only been to juvie twice, and county once.  You had respect from your affiliates, you ran dealers, had several pimps paying you for protection, and were leading the good life.  Then a rather nasty gunfight erupted down the street from your place, you went outside with your AK to wast some fuckers stupid enough to shoot up you neighborhood and met this beautiful woman on your lawn, she was covered in burned clothes and looked pretty messed up.  She was bending over this guy and seemed to be making out with him, but the dude was out.  Then she looked up and captured your eyes.  Next thing you knew this chick was living in your basement and you loved working for her, she was some strange blood sucking vampire chick, but damn she was hot.  You loved being around her and doing stuff for her.  She was fighting the Asians (they were the fuckers that dared attack her) and she needed help doing so, you had contacts and skill, and she let you help her in all the little ways you could.  2014 was the best year of your life.  Then in February of 2015, she embraced you as you had proven yourself invaluable to her.  She told you of the war going on in LA and the sides involved, and how you were very much not what her clan normally wanted, but in LA you were what they needed.  Your "art" was survival and revenge, a much better way to live in LA than sculpting and poetry.  The Anarchs sound like the people you have worked among all your life, the Sabbat sound like some crazy violent nasties, and the Camarilla seem to be the white collar that you have been locked out of by birth.  Theresa was caught and killed by the Asians last month, and that really pissed you off, you figure the only ones taking the fight to the Asians right now is the Camarilla and you should go check them out.

records.player: Dave Wootan CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: As a kid, I watched a lot of Kung-Fu movies. Bruce Lee, Van Dam, Hong Kong flicks; I couldn’t get enough. I begged my parents for karate lessons and never looked back. At every level I was a top competitor. I was on the way to becoming a world champion by the time I reached my 20’s. That’s when a motorcycle accident resulted in a ruptured my Achilles tendon and ended my competitive career. I tried not to get too low about it. Some producer who’d followed my career offered to hook me up with some people in Hong Kong to try my hand at martial arts movies. It ended up being some of the best years of my life. Now in my early 30’s, and living well, life dropped another bombshell on me when I was diagnosed Cancer. This time, I couldn’t pick myself up. I went into a suicidal binge of every vice imaginable. I got into trouble over and over until my visa was revoked and I was sent back to the States. That same producer guy was there to save me again. Only this time he revealed his true nature to me and offered to not only cure my disease, but make me faster, stronger, and immortal. I didn’t even think twice, and on March 3rd, 1989, I was embraced. Though I’m not allowed to be in movies or compete, I’ve found my skills to be quite in demand. I’ve consulted on movies and TV shows. I’ve given private martial arts lessons to Kindred and mortals. I’ve even been on the front line of more than one tussle with the enemies of the Camarilla. I figure L.A. will give me the opportunity to continue all of the above.

records.player: Joel Ainsworth CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: Ever since I was little, I loved to draw. I would doodle on everything. Honestly though, I was never good at it. The picture in my mind never really translated well through my hands and onto paper. I did, however, have a knack for computers and programming. Naturally my parents and teachers encouraged me to put down the sketchbook and take up the keyboard instead. I can’t really say it was a bad call. I excelled tremendously and had recruiters beating down my door even before I finished college. Still, I never lost my passion for drawing, so I decided to put my programming skills to work, and create software that could help anyone become the artist they dream to be. Digital Artist” revolutionized the art industry. One piece of software could replace thousands of dollars in art supplies and equipment. The digital artist was born. Several updates and editions followed, making me a wealthy man. I was considered the founding father of a new era in art. The old guard hated me for it. I didn’t set out to start a revolution, but I was at the center of one now. The president of my distribution partner introduced me to Ilene Bennett; a beautiful business woman who donated heavily to the arts and was a well known patron of up and coming artists. We shared a passion for change, progress and shared a mutual respect for one another. I invited her over for a drink and our conversation carried on into the night. That night she offered me immortality and an opportunity to breathe new life into the “Clan of the Rose”. What can I say? She was very convincing, and I love a good challenge. The scorn and resistance I received from the mortal art world was nothing compared to the old fossils of Clan Toreador. At least those old men had wardrobes that belonged to this century! Though they don’t understand what I’ve created, nor do they respect my talent; they fear me because I am the writing on the wall. The world is changing. Art is changing. They can’t seem to change themselves.

The type that used to be an ARTIST, he’s nothing but washed up  now. #4 George Kershaw ( Toreador Primogen, Seattle WA, out of game) George said to call if you need anything, he would be willing to see what he could do.

Partner with other Kindred or secure venture capital for a new business endeavor that promotes your artistic philosophy. #3. Build a safe haven for young like-minded Kindred.

records.player: Maire Bourke CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: I grew up the faithful daughter of wealth Spanish land owner in Sonoma, California. And though I was educated and quite opinionated, I never would have thought to go against my father’s wishes. Not until I met Alexi. We made an odd couple: a fur trader and a senorita. But we were happy and in love, and I with child. It was inevitable that my father would discover us. The sweet man I’d known my whole life became a cruel and murderous monster. He beat me til I miscarried. He had my beloved executed on false charges. Whatever lingering love I had for my father, died along with Alexi. It was all to avoid scandal, to protect the family name. Somehow it made it worse knowing that was business instead of personal. He took everything I loved from me, so I vowed to do the same to him. Stealing his life away was easy. Even though he knew how much I hated him, he could never imagine that his little girl would lift a finger against him. Over years I slowly poisoned him, trying to learn all I could about the family holdings and business as he grew sick and weak. I listened at dinner parties, eavesdropped on his conversations, and read every book he read. When death finally came, it was only natural that I take over the business, I was the eldest child and my mother never took it upon herself to learn. My machinations did not go unnoticed however, and I was soon confronted by the man that would become my sire. No other soul save for Alexi, had appreciated my intellect and actions such as he. He taught me how to be a Kindred and Toreador; and in short order, I was once again my own woman. For nearly two centuries I have been a steady influence in California. Through Anarch revolutions and Camarilla reconquista, I have remained. Now I come to the City of Angels to take might rightful place amongst the elite. After all, it is my birth and blood right.

She is from San Fran.#3 Madeleine Pelletier (Brujah) She is obsessed with “Womens Issues” and women being “empowered” you can control her and use her easily. #4 Steven DuSant (Toreador, NPC) he is supposed to be the centerpoint of the Toreador information and club scene in LA. Start a new business venture to attract the Kindred and Kine elite.

records.player: Chris Dasaro CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: Growing up, I always looked to writing to escape my boredom. Through high school and college I impressed my instructors, and it wasn’t too long after I graduated that I published my first novel. It certainly wouldn’t be the last. Success came quick and I found myself scrambling to remain anonymous. I didn’t want the fame, I just wanted my works to be appreciated by the masses. And though I became very adept at keeping my true identity hidden, the woman that would become my sire managed to find me. Though she was beautiful, her obsession with my work frightened me. By the time she offered to “preserve” my gift forever, I was in a near panic. She embraced me that night. At first, I was delighted. I would have eternity to hone my craft. It quickly became evident however, that I’d lost some essential part of me when I lost my mortal life. That creative spark that every artist thrives upon  was simply gone. Every time I sat at my typewriter words would flow forth, but it was nothing more than poorly veiled regurgitations of my previous works. Each night since has been a torture. Desperate to regain my sparks, I travel far and wide. I’ve seek out the wisest of us and delve into the darker regions of Kindred society. I’m at my wits end. My spark keeps eluding me, and despite the eternity before me, I find my existence has no meaning or purpose. Not too long after arriving in L.A., a man in my employ suggested I visit a place that has been “giving hope to many that have lost much”. It was a place called “Mistress Isia’s Temple of Secrets”. I went, of course, and discovered it to be some kind of underground church; the kind that takes your life savings for a few morsels of self-help “wisdom”. As I listened and watched, I realized there was something more sinister going on. This was a full-fledged vampire worship cult! I made a discrete, hasty exit. Hopefully they did not notice me. Hopefully I am not in danger. Do I tell the authorities? Do I risk somehow being an accessory to this crime because I sought out the temple myself?
records.contacts: #1 Janet Wadsworth (Malkavian) she is a musician, but at least she still has the spark in her. #2 Laura Alvarado (Toreador) she shouldn’t have been embraced Toreador, she doesn’t have the spark, and never did.  Poseur #3 Shari Rosenthal (Malkavian) you have heard she used to be a Scholar of vampire lore, maybe he can tell you more about vampire worship cults. #4 George Yumy ( NPC) he is the one who suggested you check the church out.
records.plot_goals: #1. Continue to research a way to regain your spark. Leave no rock unturned or avenue unexplored; no matter the risk. #2. Seek out other artists to find inspiration and build up your social clout. #3. Learn all you can about the “Temple of Secrets” without being discovered.

records.player: Matt Segal CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: I’ve always been drawn to the elegance of crime. Any fool can rob a liquor store for a few c-notes and get caught. Frying the bigger fish and getting away scot-free? That takes skill and talent. You do what you have to-to survive; I got good at taking things from people that had more than I did. I wasn’t perfect. I spend the better part of my first 25 year in some sort of confinement. Each incarceration was a lesson though, and in order to survive, I got good at escaping. Nineteen times to be exact. I’d had enough of jail cells though and took up as honest work as I could stomach: assisting stage magicians. To my surprise, I enjoyed it. I went from assistant to apprentice and by the late 70’s, was carving out my own name. I started noticing a man at every one of my shows. He would sit in the same seat in the front row every time. He didn’t take in the show like a typical fan, he was studying me. For nearly a year he attended my shows; each time arriving just before the curtain went up, and leaving just as the curtain dropped. On September 16, 1978, he was waiting for me in my apartment. He revealed to me that he was a magician as well, but had seemingly lost his passion and found it difficult to embrace modern techniques. He needed someone to quicken his spirit and show him all that was new to the old game. He needed someone to live through vicariously. He embraced me that night. Very quickly my situation felt like another form of incarceration. He would analyze, criticize; but had nothing to offer that would help. As soon as I could, I found a way to escape. On my own, the old survival instincts kicked in. It’s amazing how my two skill-sets complement each other. I still keep in contact with the ol’ Burnout, but strictly from afar. Opposite coast far.

records.player: Elizabeth Estervig CS, EH, K P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: History: You never new your parents, some of your first memories where scrubbing floors. The nuns, soon learned that you had a quick wit and knew when to keep your mouth shut, so you were given greater and greater responsibilities.  With in a few years, you had surpassed your teachers, in sewing, illumination and the mysteries of stained glass. One night some unruly knights demanded entry. The nuns fled letting you and your fellow laypeople be subjected to their wants. One of the knights did not seem interested in that, the glass you were working on mesmerized him. He protected you from the others, and over time brought you in the clan of artists. You traveled together stopping at the courts of many a prince. You saw their lack of unity, and you could tell that humans were starting to raise arms.  You spoke in many salons, of the merits of a new idea. The Camarilla. A collation of princes who’s opening creed was to hide from humanity. But it was too late for you, When traveling back from the court of Bruges, a group of hunters attacked. You were heavily wounded, and only escaped by hiding in a tomb. You awoke in 2013, and found the world very changed, but your idea had flourished almost over the whole globe. After talking to some of the courtiers, they recommended you try the new world to best learn all this time has to offer.

records.player: Jennifer Wolfe CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
A7- From a young age you were called to the faith, your small town did not have many choices for a girl who wanted to think, and not die in childbirth. You joined the Carmelite as a Nun, and soon after saw evidence of the devils known as Kindred. The Inquision took you in, trained you to kill and use the powers of Thurgy , to best them. You were a good servant of God on the missions, but sometimes you felt your faith wander. You asked God "Why allow such thing to thrive, while others suffer?" That night, your team was ambushed. Killed before your very eyes, and then you brought across as a member of House and Clan Tremere. Over the years you have seen your question as answered, evil must exist for others to have faith. Your now serve your duel masters of God, & the Pyramid. People who try to work against God's will are always put on the right path by his Servants. You wish to lead your new kin in to their place as the terror of the night, and protect them as they were of your own flesh. 
You wonder sometimes, if your past may come back to haunt you, You have killed many of the sires of people you now parlay with in court and you are wanted dead by your old order for the secrets you keep. You wake up some days, with blood sweat covering you, but you are able to comfort yourself with the thought that either way.. You are doing God's plan.
You were last in a Chantry in New Hampshire, but your Regent sent you away when it was learned that the Inquision was following your movements.  Landing in Los Angeles, you are trying to bring your clan closer together as this might be your first time to lead them.

records.player: Michele Shannon CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: A6 -  Spirtualism hit is height in the 1920’s, Kristian was at the height of it, at first just conning people out of their money, and then something switched. One day when you were in a séance we you opened your eyes you saw a line of ghosts waiting to be heard. Your popularity rose, until one day you were offered 10 times your normal rate for a private reading. When the woman walked in there was the aura of death all around her, and a line of violently killed ghosts. She looked in to your eyes and just asked, “Are you are for real?” As your will sapped away from you murmured yes. It was the start of your unlife in Clan Tremere. With your special skills, you were sent to a research chantry in Atlanta with your new sire. For many years you focused on this new power, cataloging ghosts, and making friends. One day you saw a ghost unlike any other. An Asian wraith, and his background taught you that cultural differences change the powers of a wraith. Asking your superiors to look in to this further they sent you to the Hong Kong Chantry, From the moment you arrived you felt a sense of dread, every day your slumber would be filled with restless sleep, visions of destruction. Time felt like it was endless the horror of your days, and the monotony of your nights. Chu Fu (an Asian wraith) told you that the seers of the dead saw doom for the HK chantry, and your death if you did not leave that night. This shocked you in to movement, even though it was death to leave without orders you left. Landing in Seattle. As you arrived you thought you were going to turn yourself in for punishment, but your Clanmates said how luckily you were, that HK chantry was destroyed you must have just escaped with your life. As Chu Fu, saved you, his next prediction was you should move to LA, that with him you would thrive there.

#1. Try to find if anyone else can see ghosts
#2. Learn what other people might know about the Asian vampires and though them Asian ghosts.
#3. Find someone who can mentor you, you have been tossed around so many times you are looking for a place for you to have some roots.

records.player: Vanessa Kam CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
A3- You were brought up with magic in your blood, from a young age you were taught how words of power could have you do anything and it was a good life. You loved the books you read; knowledge was its own addiction. But time never stops ticking, as you aged you found your energy wane, you weren’t stupid the natural cycle is we are born we grow old and we die.. But is not the first rule of magic is you are master of your own destiny? Your books already gave you the answer. The house of tremere, left the order because they found the way to immortality. They left much behind in their exodus, things you had access to. So one night when your apprentices were asleep you knocked on the chantry door, with a deal. “Bring me in to House Tremere, and I will give you the Codex Ischys Aima” a book of ancient blood magic’s pended by Goratrix himself. It took them but a night to decide. You brought them the book and let your avatar be shredded. Over the years you have taken to your new form, accepting the price forever costs, and the monsters that want to take it from you. Your past gave you access to knowledge that most vampires even the most learned Tremere cannot fathom, and this has made you valuable.  But with all your knowledge there is sill something you are afraid to learn. As you handed the Codex, what they did not know is you had a copy of it, hidden with you even to this night. Now that you have been relocated to LA, maybe this is the time to open it? 
Even if not, history always returns, the next generation of apprentices of your old magi, have found a trail of you and seek back what you took, If not also your life. You betrayed them once for the curse, and you will fight to keep
records.contacts:
#1 April Ueltschi (Ventrue) A master of lore in her own clan she seems like a perfect person to ally up with, You have read her books, on Ventrue History. 
#2 Marcus Jonak (Toreador) He was already from los angeles, before the recent movment if anyone knows the past here he does, even if he does not know he does.
#3 Uncle Smelly (Nos Not in Game NYbN P. 74) This nosferantu some times calls and asks for information you always seem to have at your fingertips.. Maybe it’s time to call and ask him for something.
records.plot_goals:
Plot Goals
#1. Get protection from the mages hunting you
#2. Try to find someone you trust who has more magic’s then you to help you study the book, they need not be Tremere, just someone you are willing to risk you life for. 
#3. Generation seems to be the mark of existence for vampires and yours is lacking.. Find some one of a more powerful generation and plot to take it from them.. and survive.

records.player: Dan Pipoly CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
A7- So much happened so quickly, from fighting in the Great war, to abject poverty after, to a nation of supermen and super science, anyone could believe it was magic, well as long as you wore the cape and said the crazy words people would believe, after all we lived in the age of wonders. You started to advice the leaders of the Rich, and their wealthy friends. You could not let anyone see on your face how you knew it was all false, but you played your act too well. One night a group of Gestapo agents pulled you in to a room and tortured you demanding you confess it was all a lie. You knew you would die if you did, so you held on to the lie as your last shred of hope. Ironically, by believing you they killed you bringing you in to the Order of the Tremere. The first few years of your training was awe inspiring, you lived on the cusp of mankind reaching a renaissance, then it was ruined by those communist fools, by wanting everyone to be equal they destroyed the hope of mankind to be great. Becoming a kindred has proven to you that there is a divine order of things, the strong prey upon the weak, and if you want to rise above you must crush the weak out of your flock and out of yourself. Such passion made progressing on the pyramid easy for you, and soon you made friends. Friends who thought like you did. Though whispers and coded messages you learned they belonged to a secret order in Tremere called the Guernicus or the Quaestor at different times. To join this august body you must find a Tremere that has failed in the code and destroy them. 
It’s not the destruction you worry about it is finding a failure in a Clan of superiors.. So where best to find a failure where, people could not succeed in their homes,, a new city… Like Los Angeles.
records.contacts: #1 Bartholomew Douglas (Brujah) You saw this monster kill hundreds in seconds; he killed your friends in the trenches of WWI. Such power must be either be enslaved or culled. #2 Yuri Luzhko (Nosferantu) A Russian, with a background like yours, he must have learned that quality is a joke by now, and he might be a strong ally in your future. #3 Heinrich Himmler (Tremere Not in Game Berlin By Night P. 59) Having learned that your sire also embraced him, you have been in secret correspondence, for the last 5 years. You have found him a brother in arms, but you are a bit unnerved by his secrecy, he has demanded you tell no one of your interactions.
records.plot_goals: #1. Find a Tremere who has committed crimes vs the code, and  destroy them. #2. Research more in to your new secret order, someone has to know something #3. Prove your worth by taking a title in the formation of the city, the more powerful the better.

records.player: John Long CS, SH, K P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: A-7 Born in to abject poverty, Pedro graverobbed the ancient roman ruins near his village in Spain, to keep his family fed. One day he opend a cript and in a heart beat he was pushed to the ground. Vindo Belasous an ancient roman Ventrue had been awoken, he was able to gain control before he killed Pedro, and used him as his ghoul for centruries. But the bond fraied on Pedro, due to his crule treatment. One day It broke, and Pedro walked right in to his dominators enemy's haven the Tremere Lord Makiel Gutierrez. Within hours the deal was struck, Pedro would take the Lords troops past Vindo's defenses in excahnge for the embrace. That deal worked pefectly, and has put a strong work ethic in to Pedro, he knows that slavery is everywhere in kindred comunity, and he is just biding his time so he finally has people under his boot. He has come to los angeles, because he has heard taht one of Vindo's Childer has been seen here, and nothing would make him happer then ending that vampires line altogether.
records.contacts: #1 Marco del Juro  (Ventrue) You saw him get embraced by your old venture dominator, he knows you were the person who got his old sire killed. Be warry that he will retaliate. #2 Samuel Baird (Nosferantu) A Computer expert who might be able to digitize the list of legacy, and find conections you could not. #3 Makiel Gutierrez (Sire and Lord of Spain) He wants you to extend his influence to the west, on that front he will help how he can.
records.plot_goals: #1. Regency, would be great but if not, at least start having the chantry look to your old sire for help, they don’t need to know his name, but have him come out as a “problem solver” #2. Keep the Ventrue close but never trust them. If you can get someone else to kill Marco. #3. Blood bond another vampire, and treat them like a useful retainer. You know the bond and how fickle it is.

records.player: Roselle Hurley CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
From your very first science fair you knew you wanted a life in Science. It was never what you could get from it, it was the wonder you could cause in peoples eyes when you showed them the mysterious world that was all around them but they could not see.  Over time you broke the glass ceiling, and became an engineer working on the Apollo moon project. Right as you were in mission control and heard the words, One small step, you fell over. You had fallen in to a deep coma, with some brain damage, that made it unlikely for you to ever wake up. Clan Tremere felt you were an asset to valuable to just let die, so they embraced you letting the vampire blood heal and awaken you. It took you weeks to be able to talk again, but by the time you had, you also understood that your clan saw something else in you; Something they were afraid of. 
You are the melding of Science made Magical, and Magic made Scientific. They sent you to San Jose Chantry, to under go your magical training. In the matter of a few decades, you had surpassed your teachers. You could make things from illusion and make illusions real. They gave you more freedom, and you started rebuilding your old connections in aerospace. You started sneaking in to Los Angeles, before it was liberated, keeping to people you knew and areas that seemed to be safe. One night you saw an Asian man talking to a person all made of metal. You asked the mortals next to you what they saw, and they said nothing out of the ordinary. Picking up your phone you took a picture of it, and it was simply two men talking. As you returned to San Jose, and made your report, in a matter of hours was your transfer to Los Angeles chantry in 3 weeks. You were confused because there was no chantry in LA. One week before you were to leave, you hear from a redcap ghoul (Tremere servants) that LA has been taken by the Camarilla. How they knew, and what is the value of your report you have yet to see.
records.sire: Regent Luna Demian (SF by Night p.109)
records.contacts: #1 Dr. Valeire Penza (Malkavian) A member of the court of SF, you saw her at a few events, when you left the chantry, She might remember you. #2 Marcus Jonak (Toreador) He was a vampire who lived in los angeles before the camarilla took it, he might know more about the Asian metal men. #3 Regent Luna Demian NPC Sire) She has contacted you after you moved to los angeles, she has been leading the conflict vs. the Asian vampires and could be an important resource.
records.plot_goals: #1. Learn who the metal man was. #2. Try to discover why the Tremere wanted you and what was important about the moon landing. #3. Gain a new master who will give you the freedom to move around, and will also help you get to the rank where you can have your own apprentices so you can teach them your special talents.

records.player: Nobo Fett CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You were always daddy’s girl. Even though you had an older brother who was to take over the family business you know your father loved you best. When you reached maturity, your dad wanted you away from bad influences so he sent you to do you to medical school and John Hopkins. You exceled as school, but it taught you some of the darker things in life, that people sometimes are just meat under the scalpel only worth their weight in organs. Shortly after your training your brother and father were attacked in a drive by shooting. Your brother did not make it, and your father was wounded. You returned home to help him as a caretaker. Soon you saw that people respected your advice and while your father still lives you run the day to day. Your people had a party in honor of your ascension to the “throne”. During the party a taller man walked up to you, and said plainly “What are you celebrating?” You replied with.. “I’m the Queen of Los Angeles tonight.” He his laughter was the last thing you remembered while being alive. You woke up a embraced a vampire. You have been told that you are a recruit in to a war many millennia long. You belong to the Tremere, a group of ancient wizards and soon you will have magic at your control. The skills, and influences and the power of the one that turned you will make a powerful foe for any who oppose, but time is needed to mature your powers. In a matter of a few days he taught you a new language just speaking the words in to your head. Also he has introduced you to the other members of your new family who will raise you after your sire moves to fight the war elsewhere.
records.contacts: #1 Nathaniel Johnson (Ventrue) A mob boss you know from family dealings, now you realize why he never seems to have aged. #2 Martha Dixon Martinez (Gangrel) She was an FBI agent, who was killed in the line of duty when you were a kid, seeing her at a vampire court, really makes you wonder how many vampires are there. #3 Ulugh Beg, The Watcher  (NPC Archon and sire) While he embraced you, he has left your training to be done by the los angeles tremere, any information you give him he will likely reward.
records.plot_goals: #1. Get a mentor in the clan to show you the ropes. #2. Try to make a deal with a non-tremere to support the tremere. #3. Now that “magic” exists try to learn every thing else supernatural out there you did not know about.

records.player: Mike Kelly, C, EH, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You were born and trained as a hedge mage, worked in conjunction with the Lupines called Children of Gaia a few times, met a changeling, and served a master mage of the Verbanae tradition.  The last was your downfall,  you were perverse and had a "thing" for those whom your master did not approve of and had ordered you to stay away from.  One day you were entertaining and your master came home early from a trip, he discovered you in your deviance.  In his anger and outrage he stripped you of your powers, and cast you out.  You took your anger and vengeance and went to the only place you knew could give you power after you had been stripped in such a fashion, you well knew how he would have spread word of your deviance.  House Tremere, the vampire house would take you in and provide you the means to be more than just some servant.  Since the early 1900's you have been a Tremere in service to the pyramid, and your new masters will help you make your old master suffer.  You were able to track down a recentlyl released apprentice of his last year, when you captured and interrogated her you discovered that he was supposed to be in the north of Los Angeles, in America.  As luck has it, your clan has put out the call for members to go to LA, you can look like you are responding to a clan call, and you can carry out your purpose at the same time.
records.contacts:
#1  Isha Patel - She is reputed to be a master of a great many lores, it is also rumoured that she was a mage prior to embrace                                                                        
#2  Elof - he is supposed to be of Clan Gangrel, the apprentice you "interrogated" babbled something tangenital about him and you heard his name, something about a ritual centered on him                                                                        
#3  Louis Fortier - You and he met once when you were traveling throug Los Angeles in the late 1930's, it might be interesting to see if he can be of any help in your hunt if the Camarilla resources fail you
records.plot_goals: #1 Go to LA and set yourself up in the chantry, let no one suspect your real reson for being here has nothing to do with them or their cause here.  #2 You have heard that the Clan Nosferatu can find out anything, make allies of them, or at least a key one; they can assist you in finding your sire, and avoid his magical protections.  #3  Find and kill your sire

records.player: Nicholas Russell C, EH, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You were a true believer, Crowley taught the ways to power and success.  And during one meeting you met a demon in person, you were afraid of dying more than anything, the demon (vampire of Clan Tremere) offered you eternal youth , power, and beauty in exchange for service.  They made you a ghoul servitor and promised that you would have be undying and with service and effort you would be inducted to the higher mysteries.  You served for nearly 20 years, learned as much as you could and were a faithful servant of House and Clan.  Then you were inducted and they gave you magic powers and told you several new truths.  You were now accepted in Clan Tremere, on the bottom of the pyramid, but you believe that with time you will prosper.  You have done well, you have advanced as an apprentice and now a new exciting and yet very dangerous opportunity has arrived.  The Clan is calling for Apprentices to go to Los Angeles to serve on the front lines against the Cathayans.  You have an exciting opportunity to excel in this, or die.
records.contacts: 1: Dr. Valerie Penza (Malkavian): You've heard of her work with Kindred blood. Perhaps you can work with her to further your personal understanding of blood magic? 2: Alfons Davis: You've become aware of him mostly through his hatred of your clan. Perhaps you can convince him not all Tremere are bad? 3: Victor Ceeq: A fellow apprentice Tremere, he's done work you've heard of and think well of.
records.plot_goals: #1 Go to LA and make yourself indespensable, you are skilled, find a niche that is open and occupy it.  #2 Make alliances with those not traditionaly at the top of the pyramid, seem to be receptive to their needs, you can make so many allies cheaply this way.  #3 Find a way to assist the clan in their goals and reputation with a clan that is being overlooked in the court.

records.player: Robert Saunders CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: A-3 Being born as a Revenant has molded every part of your existence. The secrecy, the incarceration, the menial work for decades over and over. But you never faltered. You knew there was going to be the moment you would be able to prove your worth and that day did come. You were asked to spy on a group of Sabbat that were planning on attaching a local court. Spying for the 3 weeks, showed you how worse your life could have been, the Sabbat see their revenant as playthings, not even tools. The moment you got the information you needed you raced back towards the chantry. In your elation to leave you made your first mistake, and were tracked back to the chantry. Turning the doorknob, you saw the darkness rip from your chest, as you blacked out. You awoke as a full vampire member of the Tremere. The reward for the information that was so vital. You are proud of where you came from; you are a classic example of the janitor though hard work joining the board of directors. You know every operation from the ground up, in ways your other chantry mates never will. Regardless of your determination or skill, you still hear the other Tremere talk down to you, they still see you as half human, and not their equal. You must prove them wrong, but in the only way you know how. Perfect service, until.. Wait don’t think about that.. but it must be said, now that you are as one of them, someday you will surpass them. You came to LA, to a new chantry, to give you the chance for quicker promotion, and also to start a household of Revenants. You have a few that help you, and 2 that are pregnant. When you are ready to make your move, your secret allies will allow you to best any of those who scoffed.
records.contacts: #1 Shari Rosenthal (Malkavian) Having been kicked out of her old city because of studding noddist lore, she might know some of the ancient ways to help your “family” #2 Terry Hamby (Nosferantu) Money does not grow on trees, a deal with him might supply enough for the clan and the family. #3 Prudence Ducheski (Revenant Not In Game) She is the defacto, Mother Superior, to the new household, any requests should be made to her, and she will do her best to get them done.
records.plot_goals: #1. Gain Rank in the Clan, and have a master who trusts and respects you. #2. Start building a manse for your revenant families. They will take a huge amount of support, and extra ghouls to keep the blood strong. #3. Gain allies outside of the clan, they don’t have the issues your clan mates do because they don’t even know what a revenant is.

records.player: Cory Wilkerson CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: Your original name was Ulrich Morris, a retainer of Lady Anne Bowesley from her mortal years. You were always on her side solving her problems dealing with the mortal world, when she was elevated to Prince of London she rose you to the ranks of the undead. Having served as a ghoul for hundreds of years even though decades have past you have yet to break the habit of opening doors for people or getting up when people ask for something. Calling the politics of London extreme would be an understatement, as even Anne, did not start her powerbase there you asked for advice on where to go to make your spurs. After a week she said, Prepare to go to Los Angeles so prepare you did. Why she wanted you to go to an Anarch city, was beyond you. Until one night in court, an Archon came and said that Los Angeles was taken by the Camarilla. How did she know eluded you but you will not question the wisdom that has gotten you this When you were leaving she gave you two things, One advice “Always let a Tremere feel they have the upper hand regardless of what you actually give them” and secondly, and second a request, “There is a book of our legacy lost (something that says all the Ventrue and their generations) a seer has said it will arrive in los angeles. If you can return it to the clan, I will have a personal reward for you my old friend. You got on the plane, and landed in Los Angeles when you tried to feed you learned that none of your old herd fills you anymore. Only vampire blood seems to, You called the Queen in a panic, and she told you that it is common in your line, especially if you lived on vampire blood for so long, and she said you must take the Princehood, or at least get a prince to give you permission to hunt other vampires.
records.contacts: #1 Luke Jackson  (Toreador) A jack of all trades that would make a great ally in the nights coming. You have heard of him but never met. #2 Alexandar Baird (Brujah) A famous sheriff of many courts, the problem is what he is famous for is his princes dying.  #3 Lady Anne Bowesley (Sire) As how well you do reflects on her, she will be happy to help when she can.
records.plot_goals: #1. Find a stable blood doll in the court, they don’t know your immune to the bond, so maybe they will fall for a lets have a mutual. #2. Get permission to have right of destruction, either as Prince, Sheriff, or Scourge. #3. Find the Book of Legacy, and punish the thieves.

records.player: Sean Patrick OLearly CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
You were an officer in the Spanish Army; you came in with Franco and led many units to victory after victory. Your inspirational speeches kept your people moving forward, and as the nationalists finally won you wondered your place in this new government. Receiving an invitation to dinner, in a wealthy mansion, you polished your buttons and prepared to be given your rewards. The dinner was not what you expected; it was with one person and his butler. You were asked about the nature of power, and what is the “secret” of leading people. Presumably you answered well because that night you were induced in to the clan of kings.  You’re first few years, where harsh but nothing as harsh as the military, and you thrived. You gained your own haven, and only visited your sire occasionally. One of these times you found the haven assaulted by Tremere, being directed past the security by the Butler, Pedro. Seeing yourself outnumbered you jumped from the roof and escaped. Weakened from the fall you fed off the first person you found, and their sickness is still with you. Soon you started traveling, using your military knowledge and the invention of new ways of war to sell powerful weapons to princes and rebels alike. The death of your sire still haunts you, and it has made it that you try your best to not be in the battles anymore. After all is this not the role of kings to but order people and never be on the front?
Recently a weapon was brought to your attention, it was in the hand of an Anarch of Berlin. This handgun, takes bullets are almost shotgun shell sized, and you can not seemly produce anything that makes it shoot. It cost you dearly to acquire it, and the only lead on it is “Mjollnir Mk. IV -  Los Angeles - ”
records.contacts: #1 Pedro Villalobos (Tremere) He was a ghoul who betrayed you and your sire. He killed him in the name of his new clan. #2 Bobby Santos (Assamite) He is a famous gunfighter, if you can get the gun to work, he will pay almost anything for it. #3 Jerome Walters (Ventrue Not in Game) he is a news mogul, who was an ally of your old sire and will try to help how he can.
records.plot_goals: #1. Learn about the gun, who made it, who is selling it. #2. Mentor someone, you were trained well, pass on the tradition. #3. Gain permission to embrace, Your line can not end with you.

records.player: Rachel Judd CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: (Settite) At school you were a good student, regardless of your families protest that “good girls” did not need an education.  You started sneaking out at night dressed as a man, 3 weeks after you started you noticed you were being followed. After going down a dark alley, you were pushed down, a man leaned over you with fangs extended, and then he realized you were a woman. He started laughing and you felt compelled to follow him.  He showed you the nature of vampirism, and the aspects of clan Ventrue, he explained that he only fed from men, & that when he found your duel nature he knew that you were very good at hiding what you were, Years past until finally he said you were ready for the final secret before your embrace. He said he was not a Ventrue, but a Settite. That the clan of corruption had many vipers in other clans, and he had been doing this for 400 years. If you wanted to be turned, you would have to live a double life forever. Shortly after your embrace you decided the best way to be a Ventrue is to be a gatekeeper, if you wrote the book on what it means, they would all think you are more real then even they are. After mastering that you started to study your true heritage, and underwent the conversion to the Path of Ecstasy. You made yourself a double life. Mistress Isia keeper of a temple of secrets, and Ms. Ueltschi Respected Loremaster of Clan Ventrue. When you learned that Los Angeles was opening up, it seemed like a place big enough for you to grow both sides of your unlife. Recently when running your temple services (under a mask) you saw a person who stayed in the background, but you knew them to be one of the kindred Paul Cotte. While this means you need to be extra careful, it also means this might be a new route to power if you can convert them to the ways of “Mistress Isia”.
records.contacts: #1 Paul Cotte  (Toreador) In looking him up you have learned that it is felt he has lost what makes his art.. Maybe you can “inspire” him #2 Dr. Valerie Penza (Malkavian) She wrote a book about using vampire blood to bring people to enlightenment. Maybe you can corrupt her work to your ends. #3 Basara Al-Butta (Sire Not in Game) He holds that what would give you true independence, one can only hope if your church of mysteries thrives in his eyes you will be worthy of it’s return.
records.plot_goals: #1. Expand your Temple, by getting other influence and boons, that you can give to the Temple members making them more supportive. #2. Secure a domain, where you will not be disturbed by anyone, so it is easier to switch personas. #3. Gain permission to embrace, Your line can not end with you.

records.player: Garrett Scarborough CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: You have always been near the business of selling people, graduating from being a lookout for the constables, to a recruiter to eventually a runner of your own stable of women. One day a westerner came to your brothel and said he wanted to buy in, you had no intention at first but after the third meeting, you were willing. Over the years you began to learn the nature of vampires and what they were looking for, and your ghoul extended lifetimes gave you the time to learn how to tailor your wares to their wants. Thousands of vampires visited your brothel, more then you can remember, but you listened, and in doing so you learned of the war between the Kuei-jin and your Ventrue masters. The 1000 devils tried to push in to your business as well, after rebuking their attempt you were given the embrace as a reward. You did your Ventrue training in secret, because your sire wanted an ace up his sleeve. That was all until 1999. The Kuei-Jin did a full on assault on the island, and you were able to escape with your floating haven. You sailed around Australia and new Zealand. You made friends everywhere, one of these friends said he had a gift for you but it had to be picked up in Los Angeles. You thanked him but waited out your time, (going to an anarch or a kuei-jin city did not seem like the best of ideas) but recently you have heard that the camarilla has made a place safe and are looking for people with talents. So you pulled up anchor, and pulled in to Marina Del Rey Harbor. Shortly after landing you picked up the package that had been waiting for you.. It’s a staked Kuei-jin. You have spent many nights looking at him trying to decide what to do but it eludes you. Maybe your clanmates or the help of another clan might give you the answers about this body of the enemy.
records.contacts: #1 Scott Davenport  (Toreador) A Hong-Kong-Action-Flick actor, you met briefly, at a dinner party, before the fall. Odds are he does not remember you. #2 Janet Wadsorth (Malkavian) A intriguing performer, that a few of your girls could not stop talking about. If you were to get her to perform, it would make getting that next generation that much easier. #3 Oliver Thrace (Tremere Not in Game) He escaped Hong Kong as well, but sill checks up on you, to make sure things are going ok for you. As he sent you the Kuei-Jin.
records.plot_goals: #1. Find a better place, then your haven to keep the body, and someone who could help you interrogate him. #2. Get as many people as possible to attend your club, the more they use it the more they need you, the more you can learn from them. #3. Make sure that whoever becomes leader your boat is considered an Elysium.

records.player: Charles Stanton CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
When you were 16, your dad told you a secret. Vampires existed. You wanted to laugh it off, but your dad was not the kind of person to makes things up. He was a mid level cash transporter for a minor bloodline of the Giovanni called the Millners. One day though, dad did not come home. Your mom was heartbroken, and at that moment you knew you had to fix her pain. Now 23, you made it your goal to kill the people who put your father in harms way. Plotting for the next 10 years, you made money and contacts, everything you would need to win but one thing. You needed to be a vampire. In your investigations you learned of the clans, the masquerade and realized this was your time to move. You put all your influence in to play, having a vampires car get stolen from court, his bank accounts wiped, ect. After 2 weeks you made a call, I can fix all of this if just you embrace me. After some back and forth, and 3 havens getting burnt by arsonists. The deal was struck. You were now a member of Clan Ventrue, the first moment you had your freedom you raced to the house of the man who killed your father, and it was empty. Your gathering of influence, pushed out the people you wanted to destroy. You started traveling, using your mob contacts to help the clan and to squash any Giovanni influence you could find. After 50 years you accept the fact that most of the cities influences have been locked down, So when the Clan asked you to go to a city where all of the controllers of the influences had left you were on the next plane. 
Talking to one of your most trusted advisors, you heard something that made you lose your composure for the first time, You heard there is also another major player in this town, Martin Stanton and that’s your father’s name. Your influences have extended as far as possible to determine if it is the same man or what sect he belongs to, but you know he is not a Ventrue.
records.contacts: #1 Edward Caplette (Toreador) A computer expert you helped in the past solve a problem with a corporate takeover, you were paid well for your services and he owes you nothing, but it might be enough of a contact to grow. #2 Anthony Bachmann (Nosferantu) An expert builder of havens and other defensible places, he would be a big accet to your organization.  #3 Jonny Lee (Not in Game) This is one of the New Promise Mandurate members who are still active in the influence game. Getting him taken out would solve a lot of your problems.
records.plot_goals: #1. Become a vital source of all influence work in Los Angeles. #2. Gather Boon’s and secrets to influence people to help you find out more information about Martin. #3. Make a deal with who ever becomes Scourge or Sheriff, that they will not kill Martin if he is found.

records.player: Shawna Leader C, EH, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s: There is a distinct difference between a con man and a grifter: a con artist gets the job done; a grifter does it with style. And you have style in spades. Growing up one of four girls in Belfast, Ireland, you surpassed tomboy” and launched straight into an early career of “juvenile delinquent”. Your parents had no idea what to do with you, so in 1843 they surrendered you to the ‘Magdalen Asylum’, aka – Magdalen Laundries workhouse. It only took one week and one beating for you to realize this was not the life for you. But you’d already caught the eye of “Sister” Margret, the nun the other girls called the Night Witch. You  joined her ranks if ghouled assistants, spending both Great Wars under her tutelage before finally being embraced into Ventrue in 1950. She used you to launder petty cash, make all the bribes and skims clean for the Laundry, and the diocese. And once embraced, you used those contacts to establish a nice and tidy organization of your own, taking her dirty money, cleaning it up, and helping it grow. Your skills, your charms, your panache – your operation was an example to others. But you never could shake the thrill of taking a drunk footballer to the felt and empting his pockets. So much so, when this odd little town called “Las Vegas” started getting a reputation over in the States, you couldn’t help yourself and relocated your operation there. You moved to Los Angeles about two months ago, when there was a misunderstanding in Vegas, the dons made sure you were compensated but hey, it cant hurt to start in a new city.
records.contacts: #1: Madeleine Pelletier: You've heard of the famous cross-dressing French feminist and activist, and admired her work, but you had no idea she'd been Embraced! She's a Brujah, which might be an obstacle to befriending her; but you nevertheless feel the two of you might have things in common. #2: Fernando Mosqueda: A Nosferatu who operates a shipping company in the Southwest, you've paid him for his services several times. He's a solid dealer, which you can respect. #3: Zhao "John" Leiji: Another Ventrue whom you've only heard of by reputation, he might be persuaded to join in on your cons. #4: Micah Langtry: A Ventrue who can barely remember he's a vampire, you feel sorry for the lad and have invited him to travel with you. He's a grifter, like you, though you're better. You've traveled together from Vegas to Los Angeles in search of new opportunities.
records.plot_goals: #1: With LA becoming a newly established Camarilla city, the opportunties are endless! Make friends and contacts, see who's an easy mark. #2: You've studied the cons and heists of the greats, and now you feel ready to join their ranks. Plan a truly epic con. They may never know who was behind it, but they'll never forget what you did! #3: As much as you hated your time in the Laundries, in retrospect, you recognize a lot of wasted talent went into them. Brilliant, creative and driven women; reduced to washing men's smallclothes. Things are better nowadays, but not much. Set up an institution like the Laundries that will let you filter the diamonds from the coal. Perhaps you'll find your own childe among them.

records.player: Mike Leader CS, EH, K, P
records.key_c_charactersheet_done_cs_character_s:
Life is a game and you’re on top!  You Think?
If there is one thing you are saddest about its probably not knowing what came before this point. Your memory goes to August 2014, you remember being in Portland OR in some rundown motel.  You had a map with San Fran and LA circled, a large stack of cash, bank docs, and an urge to travel.  You found your keys and headed out.  As you traveled you realized you instinctively know things, you’re a vamp, how to feed, when to hide from the sun etc.  And you are a great grafter and con.  You can do cards, darts, dice, and billiards, all of it.  You can’t seem to lose at a betting situation if you try.  You enjoy it, it’s a thrill, and oh boy do the ones you beat, feel they can get something back from you in the back seat of your car, then you get their blood too.  You don’t really know what drags you south, but something warns you off San Fran, when you work your way there, it’s weird so you leave.  You make it to LA by July of ’15 and find yourself a little gambling den to call your own.  You won it from the previous sharp, but you let him stay on. Besides you always liked the taste of Polynesians for some reason.  You don’t really know why you’re in town or what drove you here, but you are sure some answers are waiting, you have to set up shop, keep your eyes open, make allies and own a few vamps, and learn all the secrets you can.
records.contacts:
1: Cool Hand Luke (Toreador) He’s a stage magician, your pretty sure he came here to set up a new little torie empire, you could befriend him, or control him.  Either way most magicians at least know some good card tricks.
2: Nathaniel Johnson (Ventrue) He’s some mob venture, find out what’s up with him, see if  you can use him and his connections
3: Unknown person (NPC) someone keeps leaving you notes, little bits of advice and little observations about what is going on around you. 
4: Shanon O'Connel: One grifter recognizes another. You met up with Shannon while passing through Vegas, and have been traveling together since. She also wants to check out the LA scene.
records.plot_goals:
1: Find out what is going on with you, are you actually Michah Langtry like your identification stated.
2: Find some allies or dupes, either way get some influence
3: Control your little corner of the underworld, make deals with who you need to, and keep your nose out of others business when needed.  Sometimes getting along means ignoring what you see.

rows: Key - C = Charactersheet done EH = Expanded History Done, P = Plot points,

Phan's parents came to the US after the Vietnam war, he was raised in Seattle, a true child of the 80's, he worked at his parents store, but dreamed of more.  They sent him to college, where he did well in business. He got a job as a banker and worked in his families store on the weekends.  He managed to open a second and third location with money saved and his skill in juggling the loans.  He was ghouled by a low rank Ventrue who needed someone to manage their money for them.  They had seen how hard he worked and the success that in his dealings. He impressed his domintor and in 1996 he was offered the embrace, took it and in a matter of a few months passed up his domitor in matters of business and money.  Then he lost the touch, something happened.   He made mistakes, he lost deals, tradeded the wrong stocks.  If it could go bad, it did.  He lost rank in the clan, his skill was gone, and he was a laughingstock. He upset several elders and narrowly avoided destruction at their hands.  He is still pissed that it is gone, he knows the theory, but he messes it up every time, every day he has horrible dreams about lost success and skill, and current failings.  He started taking his upset out on others and discovered he has the mindset to beath the fuck out of people for fun and profit. He is on a stipend from the clan and at its service, but at heart he wants to make his own way.  But he is done being a pass around toy.  . At least as a Ventrue he is still trusted, but he knows the best he will ever be is the trusted muscle, at least here in LA he has a use and is needed, now he just needs a good patron.  And he has to find a way to break the curse he got.  It has to be a curse, right?

#1 Get a patron to pay the bills  #2 establish yourself as invaluable to
 whomever becomes the leader of the clan in LA  #3 Get some resources to
 get rid of this damn curse, find out what it is, how to deal with it, 
and why you?
